But after being given a second chance at life after death, Roelle realizes that she might be able to use her magical gifts to change her bitter fate. From friendship to romance, and even family... Can Roelle use her blood magic for good while learning to love and be loved?

(Source: Tappytoon)
Note: This is a promotional one-shot for the web novel of the same name.

title_en: Can the Grand Duke and the Marquis be Friends?
description:
Obet has no idea what she signed up for when she attends the prince's oath ceremony disguised as her sick twin brother. Before she can make a good impression on the prince, a snooty young lord pokes fun at her, and the two of them spend the day bickering with each other. As it turns out, the lord is none other than Hinn, the son of the grand duke. To make matters worse, he instantly recognizes Obet when he visits her estate! Once he threatens to reveal what she did and bring shame to her family, she has no choice but to be nice to him. It's easy enough to avoid him at first, but this becomes harder when they start attending the same academy. Will Obet be able to keep Hinn from exposing her secret, despite the fact that he seems to be on a mission to annoy her 24/7?

(Source: Tappytoon)

title_en: Marriage B: Wed to the Enemy
description:
Goyoh Rubiet did everything in her power to avoid an arranged marriage with the power-hungry Marquess Anthe Betelgeuse. Instead, Goyoh's sister is forced to marry him, but it's not long before Goyoh learns that her sister has been murdered by the marquess. Soon after, as she's struggling with guilt, Goyoh wakes up as a past version of herself. This time around, Goyoh is determined to accept her arranged marriage to save her sister. But is there any way she can avoid meeting the same grisly fate?

(Source: Tapas)

After being reborn as a desolate fire witch and villain destined to die a tragic death, Chersinia creates a plan to avoid her fate by gambling at a casino to become a wealthy recluse. The only problem? She somehow ends up with a slave boy named Ben instead of the money she needs! But much to her surprise, she starts to warm up to Ben, who provides the perfect joy and comfort in her lonely life. Little does she know that Ben has a dark secret that will change her life forever...

(Source: Tapas)

Inside the world’s most popular MMORPG, the fearsome Dragon of Despair Taphras is raided by the game’s most powerful guild, composed of six top-rankers. Upon Taphras' defeat, he is divided into six items and split between each of the guild members. Little do they know that Taphras’ sister, Ignis, the Dragon of Destruction, has been awoken. Now, to resurrect her brother, Ignis must take down the guild members one by one and unite the missing items in this dragon-sized tale of revenge!
(Source: Tapas)

title_en: I Swear I Really Like You
description:
What am I to you? Boyfriend? A boy toy? A hostage? A witness? Why did you save my life and just walk away? Why would you transfer to my school and tell everyone we go way back? On a different note, why do you always have a gun? And why do those foreigners keep chasing after me? Will I survive being next to you?

(Source: WEBTOON)

'Something is SNS, dating lightly, ex-lovers like friends' These days, dating is like this? Haha Really? lol. A spring day full of excitement.. I will be satisfied with the webtoon again this time. ^^ Stories Featured: 1) Chajatda! Kiss Zone (찾았다! 키스존 - Found! Kiss Zone) by Lee Dong-Geon 2) Sunkiss-husseom? (선키스후썸? - Sunkiss Aftersome?) by Kang Hwanyoung 3) Seonghyang Chai Hh (성향 차이 ㅎㅎ - Difference in Inclination) by Gong Cheol-Jin 4) Neon Naui Trend (넌 나의 트렌드 - You are my Trend) by Sangha 5) Nae Chingurang Jamanchu (내 친구랑 자만추 - Sleep with my Friend) by Mun-To 6) Sangnamja Kim Ha-Yul-Teuk (상남자김하율특 - Real Man Kim Ha Yul Teuk) by Yeo Seulgi 7) Jamanchu? Jamanchu! (자만추? 자만추! - Conceit? Let's go!) by Kim Hyuna 8) Bidaemyeonsueop! (비대면수업! - Non-face-to-face Classes!) by Seyun 9) Joseonnamja X MZ-Yeoja (조선남자 X MZ여자 - Joseon man X MZ Woman) by Ryoung 10) Gajja Couple Doenayo? (가짜 커플도 되나요 - Could it be a fake couple?) by Olso 11) Ingeopat Villain (잉어팟 빌런 - Carp Pot Villain) by Han Seong-Man 12) Eumchimjjinttawaui Date (음침찐따와의 데이트 - A date with a Yumchimchintta) by Rujeuna and Dai 13) Naekkeoindeut Naekkeogateun Neo (내꺼인듯 내꺼같은 너 - You are like Mine) by Sunga 14) Namdeul Da Haneun Yeonae (남들 다 하는 연애 - Love that everyone else does) by Seo-Nye 15) Ya, Na Bokaksaeng Hwaseogijana (야, 나 복학생 화석이잖아 - Hey, I'm a fossil of returning students) by NIMNI 16) Hwayoirui Agun (화요일의 아군 - Tuesday's Ally) by Lusideu 17) Joayo (좋아요 - Like) by Hyojung 18) Naman Bom (나만 봄 - Only I See) by Jyabachip 19) Eojjijeojji Ujji Bom (어찌저찌 우찌 봄 - Somehow it's Spring) by Ori 20) Biroso Pieonan (비로소 피어난 - Blooming at Last) by Youngmo 21) Analogy Naming (아날로지 네이밍 - Analogy Naming) by Sam 22) F-wa T-sai (F와T사이 - Between F and T) by Olive-yu (Source: Naver, translated)

He is a dark beast worthy of his name who’ll do anything for money. This is what Isabella Barret is told about Lion Black, the man she must marry while in disguise as his actual fiancée, Violet Lancaster. As dangerous as this gamble is, if Isabella manages to fool Lion until their one-year marriage contract is over, she’ll be freed of yet another contract that has kept her shackled for the past five years. But to Isabella’s surprise, she isn’t the only one putting up a fake act in the relationship, as Lion’s heart might not be as cruel as his reputation suggests. And what’s more, the longer Isabella looks at him, the more she begins to see in him a precious old friend who presumably died years ago…(Source: Tappytoon)

Yoon Hana finds out that her family is moving out just before the high school entrance ceremony. At first she as worried about transferring to a new school, but her bright personality prevents her from being depressed for too long. However, the first day at the new school doesn't go quiet well how she would imagine. She quickly encounters trouble with her intimidating desk mate, Lee Chang-wook! But soon Hana starts to learn that there's more to Chang-wook than meets the eye. This is the story of the sunny Hana's project to help the gloomy Chang-wook make friends!

title_en: We've Already Broken Up, Your Majesty
description:
After a fatal carriage accident, Rumiere Lashantia wakes up disoriented and is diagnosed with amnesia. While her identity and distant memories remain intact, her recent memories seem to have been erased. In her journal, she finds a chilling entry: “You can’t love him.” The man in question is Carl Winger, her ex-lover, whom she broke up with days before. Despite not remembering him, Rumiere is drawn to Carl and is determined to uncover the truth about the nature of their relationship.

(Source: Tapas)

title_en: Assistant Manager Kim Hates K-Pop Idols
description:
Assistant Manager Yi-Wol Kim has spent five years working a day job—and five years doing “stand-in stanning” for his boss’s daughter’s favorite idol group, Spark. During yet another Spark-related overtime, he collapses… and wakes up nine years in the past with a second chance at life. But this chance comes with a cruel condition: to undo his sister’s death, Yi-Wol must debut as a member of Spark himself. Thrown into the idol life he never wanted, he’ll have to survive fame, internal politics, and his own reluctant heart.
(Source: WEBTOON, edited)

Laviore Rea Bailey, the fake saint and heartless puppet of the merciless Prince Sidar, drinks poison on the day the prince is to give her up as an offering to the devil. Instead of dying, she reincarnates 10 years in the past. Set on righting her previous wrongs, Laviore vows to save the slave Damian Rhode Drake, whom she had once framed as a spy. As she gets closer to the mysterious Damian, new feelings start to emerge, but will this former villainess truly be able to change her ways?

(Source: Tapas)

The perfect influencer life. Having a date with the girl you like. Only confession remains, but I got caught up in an absurd terrorist incident?! "It's not an obsession, we really...! If we break up, we die!!" (Source: Naver, translated)Note: - Includes five extra chapters. - Part of YLAB's Red String Universe.

The country of Greenland, after losing the war to the Imperial Army, were in agony and despair for what will the future bring them. They had hired mercenaries to help them during the war and now they’ve come back to collect their reward while the country were still picking up their pieces of their broken dreams. By that time, the King has passed away and his heir was still too young to take up on the throne. After hearing the news of the King’s death the mercenaries decided to take over the throne and rule in his place. But there was an obstacle in their way... The Oracle!

Imagine Lee Sangyeo's surprise when she wakes up one day inside her favorite novel... and her horror when she realizes she's in the body of the adorable heroine's evil sister-in-law, Aylee Brydon! Knowing that the story will end terribly if nothing changes, Aylee is determined to save the heroine at all costs. However, her complete character reversal leads to problems in high society and causes friction with her cold fiancé, Duke Van Drave. At this rate, Aylee might be the one who needs saving!
(Source: Tapas)

If you're born with an ugly face, you have to know where to fit in and where to leave out, and be able to discern what's acceptable and what's not. Noeul considered himself fortunate to have been born with that kind of discernment.(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title_en: I'm Fine Thank You, And You?

description: Kang Geon-woo, a genius major leaguer who has achieved wealth, fame, and everything. Even he could not continue his happy married life with his wife. Feeling the void left by his wife, he regrets it and returns to the past with the power of a mysterious ring. Will he be able to win love this time, having become a high school student during his innocent love days?(Source: Naver, translated)

“I will marry you, but I have no intention to share a bed with you.” The charismatic princess of Bashar meets the sharpest sword of the empire! The life of the two newlyweds united for alliance is a battle in itself. The tingling thriller of a romance between two brave and beautiful individuals who have never loved unfolds! (Source: WEBTOONS)

As the unfortunate red-hair baby, Tilias is saved at the brink of her death by the beautiful yet penniless Linden family. Reborn as a baby, she's unable to speak or express her gratitude to the Linden family, but that's when she discovers that she sees weather signs on top of people's heads! After countless experiments, she realizes that the weather signs depict people's love affairs. She uses her special ability to read other people's love affairs to her advantage and return the love she received.

(Source: POCKET COMICS)

title_en: The Genius Sales Person: Mind Reader
description:
Jihun Min is a diligent and honest medical sales representative who is trying to make a name for himself in a company that is rampant with nepotism. Hence, he is constantly being outshined by his general manager’s nephew, Junseong Choi, who monopolizes sales performance through lobbying and shady tactics. One day, Jihun is blessed with a special ability that could propel him forward in his career. Things are finally going his way and he’s feeling more optimistic than ever, but will Jihun be able to maintain his strong moral compass and not lose sight of what truly matters?

(Source: Tappytoon)

title_en: CHILDREN OF VAMFIELD by DARK MOON
description: Seven boys live under the care of Ms. Marge at Vamfield House. Their peaceful lives are shattered one day after they stumble upon a secret room...(Source: WEBTOON)

Here are the key components of our story: two unusually beautiful boys (known only as Big Master and Small Master), an abandoned church, a blood-buying business, and a homeless young girl named Han-Su – who has unwittingly contracted herself to participate in said business. Big Master wants Han-Su out of the church as soon as possible, but it turns out that each of these characters needs something from each other. Big Master needs customers for blood (and Han-Su's blood asap); Small Master needs a link to the human world, and any way to aggravate Big Master (read: Han-Su); and Han-Su needs to keep away from Big Master long enough to stay in the church until she can afford her own place. It seems the boys might have a lot of time on their hands, but how long does Han-Su have to figure out what she’s gotten herself into?

(Source: Lezhin, edited)

After being abused and killed by her family in two separate lifetimes, Blesse Lavian expects nothing from them in her third life. This time, despite knowing the horrible end that awaits House Lavian, Blesse decides to keep quiet and flee when the time is right. But the more time she spends with her cold-looking father and half-sister, the more she realizes that the Lavians aren't so bad after all. Will Blesse take a chance and rewrite her third life, or will she end up betrayed once again?

(Source: Tapas)

Having escaped her abusive mother, twenty-year-old Ji-a lives a modest life with her little sister, Su-a. When Su-a does not return from her field trip under sinister circumstances, Ji-a vows to do anything she can to get her sister back. As she and her high school friend Wonseung delve further into the mystery, they find that there might be a larger conspiracy under the surface -- a tangled web that includes a cult, a mystery, and powerful figures that might shake South Korea to its core.

(Source: WEBTOONS)

Soon after losing her parents in a tragic car accident, Seol-Young meets her end, her death cleverly faked as a suicide by the murderer. She draws her last breath - cursing the Hong family for everything they'd done to make her life miserable - and wakes up in an entirely different world, with servants tending to her and addressing her as "My Lady." Now in her new body, Seol-Young must find a way to not only fend for herself in this hostile new world, but also cast her long-awaited revenge!

(Source: Lezhin US)
The repeat test-taker Ha Beo-Deul becomes a shaman and meets the foul tempered lesser dragon, Gwangcheoli.

Why do they keep killing him off? What did he ever do wrong?

A fan of the otome dating game <Arlandast Saga> finds that her ultimate bias, Rumins, ends up dead in every route but one.

After completing all routes of the game, a mysterious voice asks for her wish. Furious and choked up, she shouts to save her ultimate bias and to give him a happy life.

<Your wish has been received.>

Waking up as Senepin, the villianess who harrasses the main character, she enjoys her dream where she could talk to Rumins, alive and well.

That is, until, ‘Senepin’ realizes that her new self was not a dream.

Senepin remembers that the only time Rumins survived his damned endings was when he ended up together with the female lead, Belkina. Realizing this, she makes it her utmost priority to get Rumins and Belkina together.

But for some reason, Rumins seems more interested in Senepin than the original female lead. Will ‘Senepin’ be able to save Rumins?

Jisoo, who dreamed of becoming a fairy tale illustrator since she was young, dropped out to achieve her dream and went to her grandmother's house, where she meets Dowon.
Dowon, who was worried about not having a dream, is interested in Jisoo who is trying hard to achieve her dream.
"The farther you try to catch, the farther away you feel. When will the day you reach your dream come?"

title_en: Crazy Girl Shin Bi-A  Igyejenchokro Gada!!
description:
Tough, lazy, money lover, yet beautiful high school student named Bi-A Shin. 
While she's thinking about the era’s she suddenly falls into that ancient time period! She had to transform into an elegant lady and while she's there she faces quite an obstacle.

title_en: All I Want is My Dream Home
description: Isabel lived and died as a doormat. After waking up in the past, she gets to work on dumping her terrible boyfriend and escaping her abusive household. However, financial and legal limits stop her from gaining total independence on her own. There is one potential solution: a policy that provides housing for newlyweds! This means Isabel has to find a man to marry. Enter Sir Dylan, the perfect catch. For reasons unknown, he volunteers to become her fake husband, and they earn Ishael’s dream house. But can they turn it into a real home together?(Source: Tappytoon)

As the illegitimate child of House Flores, Irenea has been looked down on and mistreated all her life. When she learns that she is to marry the cursed "monster prince" Cesar, she quietly accepts her fate. However, Irenea is shocked to see that he is treated far worse than even a beast. Empathizing with Cesar and realizing that only she can help him, Irenea vows to give him a proper life—as a human. Yet with the whole world against them, can they ever find freedom and happiness?(Source: Tapas)

Yun-Seul appeared in Sae-Byeok’s life for a brief moment, then disappeared like a fleeting sunshower. But mysterious circumstances have brought her back to the human world and into Sae-Byeok’s life once more. She needs to reclaim what was once hers. And in order to get it, Yun-Seul needs something from Sae-Byeok that’s more important now than ever: his love.

(Source: Lezhin US, edited)

Mysterious black circles have started appearing all over the world, and whoever falls in doesn't come back out. Then one day, a black circle swallows an entire school and everyone in it, turning it into a twisted maze of nightmares. Will Doyun and his classmates find a way out?(Source: WEBTOON)

title_en: The Cup of Vengeance Is in Your Hands
description:
Princess Eudith’s story begins when her cruel brother, the king, sells her off to the neighboring kingdom to marry the queen’s powerless stepson, Prince Franz. Eudith becomes a pawn in the queen’s plot to discredit Franz and place her biological son, Krald, on the throne. Desperate, Eudith attempts to end her misery but wakes up on the day of her fateful journey. Armed with knowledge and experience from her past life, Eudith seizes the chance for revenge by helping Prince Franz take his rightful place on the throne. Will Eudith succeed in her revenge and find happiness?

(Source: WEBTOON)

What if you developed superpowers that could change your life only to discover that these incredible abilities only worked on… animals? When you’re teenager Jin Lee, that’s a pretty strange concept to wrap your head around – especially when you wish your destructive powers could help you overcome the bullies who torment you at school instead. But Jin is quickly learning that there’s a place in this world for a special individual like him – and he’s definitely not the only one of his kind out there.

(Source: WEBTOONS)

The true meaning of friendship is explored in this story about Shihyeon, who was born deaf, and Youngwoo, who acquires a disability later in life.

(Source: Pocket Comics)

Always doing her best to avoid any connection to internal powers in the company until she retires, Mo Taehee. 
Cha Soohyeok, the general manager who has overcome all kinds of obstacles, finally finds his way to be the CEO. 
The love and shameful(?) story of a young man and woman, who spent one night in a secluded cottage with their own secrets, unfolds!

After Crown Prince Marmel falls into a deep slumber, Sonidor the Dream Meister must use her power of entering dreams through physical contact to wake him. But as she takes on a new form each time she enters his dreams, she discovers that the prince isn't cursed, forcing her to delve deeper into his subconscious to discover the source of his eternal sleep. Will finding that source help him overcome his trauma, or will facing it trap the prince and the Dream Meister in a nightmare forever?

(Source: Tapas)

After a prophetic dream foretells her sister’s death in a political marriage, Arasilla Hugo takes matters into her own hands and marries in her place. Her groom? Demian Vandermeer, the knights’ captain and the brother of her sister’s former betrothed. The only problem is that mages and knights are sworn enemies, and their sharp tongues and stubborn hearts turn every situation into a competition. Arasilla races to save her sister from a tragic fate, while Demian fights for the dukedom. Will their rivalry stay just that? Or will their contractual marriage burn into something more?(Source: WEBTOON)

Atalante is the boss of a notorious organization that works in the empire’s shadow. One day, she receives a request from the emperor to assassinate a new target: the tyrant archduke Lionel Vianc. Reluctantly leaving behind her simple life with her members, Atalante heads off to perform the assassination, but for some reason… the archduke doesn’t die. After a mixup between a love potion and poison, Atalante finds herself in a frustrating predicament as the tyrant archduke not only refuses to die… but has also fallen in love with her!(Source: WEBTOON)

Blood ties bind, but vengeance severs, and in the heart of a heartless man, a fire ignites. Pil-Du Kang, a prosecutor born into a legacy of corruption, uncovers his family's harrowing involvement in his mother’s murder. Now, a chilling vendetta awakens the monster within, drawing out the primordial urge he has long sought to contain. Will he rely on the law to be his ally on this treacherous path, or will he become the judge, jury, and executioner?(Source: WEBTOON)

Mu-Sang has a quest... He must find and kill every "Gwi" that has ever existed. He is determined, and won't let anything get in his way, not even the imperial army!
While traveling and searching for the remnants of Gwi, he meets a girl who also bears the same mark crossed out than he has. A fateful encounter? Were those two fated to meet? And why does he hold such a grudge against the "Gwi"...? All are questions left to be answered!

In a world where werewolves live among humans in secret, Ji-u Han, a detective agency owner and a powerful werewolf, crosses paths with Yuseung Cheon, a famous actor, when he “accidentally” hits her with his car. And when they run into each other again “by chance,” one thing becomes clear to Ji-u: She must have him —whatever that may entail. Ji-u wants Yuseung’s rare ability to make werewolves stronger through touch. Yuseung, on the other hand, wants information on key figures in the werewolf world to eliminate them. Will they each get what they’re after? Or more importantly—will they fall in love?(Source: WEBTOONS)

title_en: Ending This Marriage for Your Happiness
description:
Having forced her husband, Alfonso, into a loveless marriage, Charlotte accepted when he sought solace from another woman. So when she wakes up in the past with a second chance, Charlotte hopes to sever ties while uniting him with his true love. To her dismay, however, any attempt to guide him away leads him right back to her! With Alfonso's gaze shifted to her, Charlotte is stuck between fixing her past regrets and shaping this new present into the future she had once hoped for with Alfonso.

(Source: Tapas)

Shin Min-Cheol is the hero of Angeles, a world where he used his powerful mana to defeat an evil king. His arms full of gold, he returns to modern-day Korea to live the dream of being rich and unemployed. However, his peaceful days are shattered when gang activity hits a little too close to home. Before he knows it, Min-Cheol's powers are recognized, and he gets swept up in international intrigue that brings him face-to-face with some heavy hitters. Is Min-Cheol really as invincible as he thought?

(Source: Tapas, edited)

A mysterious virus breaks out on board the Boat 82-08 out at sea. The people who find out about it first only want to use it as a weapon but quickly lose control over the virus. Will the Trio survive long enough to rejoin their friend Jinu? Or will it be Jinu who doesn’t make it out to meet his friends?

(Source: WEBTOON)

A doctor, Gyeong-Hun Min, has an exceptional grudge against Yeong-U Sin, the chairman of a gang called the Crimson Moon. Desperate to take revenge on Yeong-U for killing his wife and daughter, the doctor finally finds Si-Hwan Ryu, a police officer who has supernatural powers that can surpass the currently invincible Yeong-U. Leveraging this, Gyeong-Hun’s plan is to purposely create a reason for Si-Hwan to despise the Crimson Moon and destroy Yeong-U for good. Will his plans succeed? Will Si-Hwan and Gyeong-Hun finally wipe out the Crimson Moon?

(Source: WEBTOONS)

The monster-slayer troops known as 'Sretu' no longer function as they used to, and humans have become the monsters' prey.

Jin Cheong-Do, who has been living in a world full of monsters his entire life, uses a legendary item known as "Midwood" to turn back time in order to kill the one known as Ian, the cause of this whole mess...

(Source: Naver, translated)

title_en: My Virtual God is a Teenage Girl
description:
From good looks, brains, hot body, wealth, and a gorgeous family. It seemed like Ju-Min’s life was god perfect. Until he realized that his world was merely a simulation controlled by… well, a teenage girl! With just a click of her mouse, Ju-Min loses everything and returns to high school! Will he break free from the program and reclaim what he lost?

(Source: WEBTOON)

After her mother's death, Elrose Basellan was cast out by her father for 14 years. With news of his passing, Elrose rushes to claim her inheritance, but can't do so unless she's married! Desperate, she prays for a husband, and the mysterious Rakshan seems to fall from the sky! They agree to a temporary union that benefits them both, but unexpected issues keep delaying their plans for divorce. Will this fake marriage become something more? Or should Elrose have chosen her husband more carefully? (Source: Tapas) Note: Includes three extra chapters.

title_en: He Is a High School Girl
description: Choi Kang-Bae is a famous high school hooligan feared by everyone. Nevertheless, he has a huge "sister complex", which urges him to protect her sister, whatever the price... Only, how does he plan to take care of her when she studies in a high school only for girls?

When Eilec wakes up in the past after slaughtering everyone who played a part in his beloved wife's death, he knows the best way to avoid making the same mistakes would be to let Rose go. Despite this, Eilec is determined to change the future with her by his side, as he can't imagine a life without her. But when Rose regains her memories and sees that Eilec has dragged her into the hellish world of nobles and their political scheming for the second time, he realizes he has made a grave mistake. The hatred and resentment that burns in her eyes are almost as hot as the fire that killed her in the past. Will Rose find it in herself to forgive her husband, or will she burn everything to ashes, including him?

(Source: Tappytoon)

Hidden deep within the sanctuary of the forest lives the Rangae species, who form a precious jewel within their hearts once they reach adulthood. Viola, a young Rangae, has yet to form one when her village is attacked by human hunters. Due to her shocking resemblance to the late empress, she is rescued by Duke Khalid Alec Droy and assigned to serve the fifth imperial prince. Faced with the cruel hierarchy of high society and palace life, can Viola overcome her hatred of humans and discover the mysterious duke’s true intentions? 

(Source: TappyToons)

Hyemin's life as a neurosurgery resident is thrown off balance when her childhood nemesis and popular actor, Sooha, shows up at the hospital with narcolepsy. Because of the dirt he has on her, she has no choice but to comply with his demand and secretly treat his illness. On top of that, their relationship takes a complicated turn when their parents make them consider each other for marriage! And because Sooha puts the burden of rejecting the marriage on her, Hyemin vengefully does the opposite. But after the dust settles, the two realize what they have to gain from this unlikely union: for Sooha, it's a doctor who can treat his narcolepsy round the clock, while for Hyemin, it's a successful husband who won't interfere with her career. Maybe they can keep the truth a secret from their fans and loved ones... if they can stop fighting for two seconds, that is! (Source: Tappytoon) Note: Includes 10 extra chapters.

It's well-known that living with one's mother-in-law is basically hell. So marrying a poor merchant with no family should be an easy way to avoid that mess, right? Well, that was Elaen's plan until she realizes that her husband, Ahen, lied to her, and is actually the son of the empire's ferocious Grand Wizard, Kanessis Corenea, who she'll have to live with at her palace! Though intimidated at first, Elaen realizes that Kanessis is nothing like the figures in mother-in-law horror stories, and becomes enamored with her charisma and unexpected kindness. If anything, the problem here is Ahen's ulterior motives for marrying Elaen, which she only discovered after the fact. But with Kanessis by her side, Elaen is ready to face any and all challenges in her marriage. Perhaps living with her mother-in-law was the best thing to ever happen to her after all!

(Source: Tappytoon)

title_en: A Single Dad in Another World
description: OHis wife has gone missing. His baby daughter is terminally ill. But as Junhu falls to his death, he wakes up in his wife’s unfinished dark fantasy novel--a world infested with vile demons. Armed with knowledge of the story, he allies with powerful demon hunters to avert the tragedies to come. Yet every action rewrites the story in unpredictable ways, and Junhu must seek answers if he hopes to keep his daughter safe.(Source: WEBTOON)

"I can make your life more fun." A mysterious young man appeared one day in front of Yeo-Reum, who is living a dull life as a 30-year old! The way he acts straight-forward and to-the-point is very strong, kind of cute, but maybe a little overboard? What the hell do you want from me?! It's a heart-pounding, back-and-forth romance comedy! (Source: Naver Webtoon, translated)

A state-of-the-art operating room with pristine surgical equipment? No can do; just a rusty bone saw in front of a jeering crowd for you! Sound like a waking nightmare? Well, that’s the best that the finest 19th century British medicine has to offer Taepyeong Kim, a young student from Joseon who retains the memory of his past life as a surgeon in modern-day Korea. For Taepyeong, London’s supposedly cutting-edge medical education is nothing but one barbaric display of malpractice after another, and he vows to drag the profession kicking and screaming into the modern age.(Source: WEBTOON)

Seth Kwon was a born fighter. But due to his promise with his mother, he decides to stop fighting, even in self-defense… Everything changes when his father dies and leaves him with a single message: “stop getting your ass kicked”.(Source: Toomics)

title_en: Ian the Illegitimate Son Was an Emperor
description:
Betrayed and on the brink of death, Ian Verocian, a mage and the emperor of the Variel Empire, is sent a hundred years back in time by a forbidden spell. He wakes up as Ian Vratz, a margrave's illegitimate son, and soon learns he's about to be sent off to a desert tribe as part of a political treaty. Now, Ian must use his wits and powerful magic to gather allies and figure out the plots lurking around him. The question is... can this young mage change his fate before time runs out once more?

(Source: Tapas)

Long ago, ten suns rose into the sky, turning the earth into a scorched world crawling with demons. On the heavenly emperor’s orders, the hero Yae shot down nine of these ten suns. Many years later, the Solar Goddess initiates a conflict by releasing the demons with Hanbal in order to revive her sons. In response, the Heavenly Emperor calls upon Hang-ah and Dongbangsak in order to fight his wife... Can Hang-ah and Dongbangsak save the human world from the demons?!

(Source: WEBTOONS)

Life has been anything but easy for Ju-In On. She is unlucky in love, finances, and career. So when she finds out that her current company has been bought out, she just takes it as another tough break. However, the company that bought out her previous one doesn’t want to fire her… they want to hire her! Ju-In On believes her luck has finally turned until she meets the CEO of the company, Jae-Heon Do. He’s handsome, smart, charming... and the one person she hoped to never see again. (Source: Tapas, edited) Note: Includes a seven extra chapters.

"My partner is just a male friend." So-mang Park wants to have a relationship at least once in her teens. But true love leading to a dreamy romantic marriage is just a crazy delusion that'll never happen. In reality, So-mang Park and the word "date" just don't belong together. Then one day a ray of hope shines upon her. Is this what flirting is? This is a story of a cheerful yet delusional girl's quest for romance. (Source: Naver, translated) Note: Includes an epilogue.

title_en: Secrets of the Mystic Moonlit Library
description:
In an empire where women are forbidden from learning the ancient language, Luna cross-dresses as "Lou" to work as an ancient language translator. Sure, her actions are punishable by death, but what haunts her more are the depressing details of her future self's diary from the mysterious library in her dreams. Making money as a translator is the fastest way she can leave her uncaring uncle's house and change her dismal future. However, Luna's main client happens to be her cousin's fiance, Duke Rothenbern, who gets drugged with a potent love potion and needs her "assistance" detoxifying it...

(Source: Tappytoon)

Thirty-year-old Tae-Gyu Lee has been drifting through life, numb and unable to feel the highs and lows of emotion. Everything changes when a mysterious old man gives him the power to copy other people’s feelings through a strange spirit flame. But what begins as an unusual new ability soon pulls Tae-Gyu into the orbit of drama writer In-Ho Gwak , sending his life in a direction he never expected. As his world begins to shift, Tae-Gyu finds himself stepping toward an entirely new path as an actor.

(Source: WEBTOON)

When gifted fortune teller Park Do-A dies, she transmigrates into the body of Bunnie, a curse absorber for the daughter of an archduke. As the new Bunnie, she befriends Demian, a boy prophesied to bring ruin to the empire. But when Bunnie reads Demian's fortune, she learns that, actually, he has the potential for greatness and prosperity, so she decides to shape him into the next emperor instead. Will these two be able to defy destiny and rewrite their futures? Or will the curse of fate prevail?(Source: Tapas, edited)

One day, an ordinary college student, Kim Ji-Yong, begins to see Jung Jung-Hye in his dreams.After falling in love with her at first sight, Kim tries to find her, but it turns out she was... She committed suicide two years ago! A bittersweet romance in which Kim Ji-Yong struggles to save her life. Show up, right in front of me! (Source: Naver, translated) Note: Chapter count includes 19 extras.

Dominic, a war refugee who once lived as a nutritionist in a past life, settles in the small fishing village of Evergreen hoping for a quiet start. Instead, he is abruptly named village headman after the former leader steps down for the absurd reason that he refuses to learn how to read. Dominic’s nutritional and medical knowledge earns him unexpected attention when he diagnoses the former lord’s chronic foot pain through diet alone. His growing reputation soon draws the attention of the entire lord’s castle, changing his peaceful life forever.(Source: WEBTOON)
Note: Includes one extra chapter.

To flee from her abusive family, Evelyn Diego pretends to be a goddess from a prophecy and tricks the blind Grand Duke Devan Lantimos into believing she can lift his curse. Unfortunately, her powers fail to heal him completely, and things get even more complicated as she discovers that Devan's curse isn't quite what she thought it was. With time running out and her family looking for her, will Evelyn be able to cure Devan and get the freedom she so desperately wants?

(Source: Tapas)

title_en: The Young Emperor is Obsessed With Me
description: When a royal kiss fails to wake the sleeping beauty in the forest, young Prince Cedric figures a knife to the throat should do the trick. Lucky for Ariel, she awakens from her long slumber just in time to avoid a funeral at the age of 1000. Unlucky for her, she has now become the object of the twisted prince’s obsession. Though she manages to banish him from the forest for a decade, Cedric finds his way back stronger than ever as the emperor. After setting her home ablaze, he has just one thing in mind: “Let’s get married, Ariel.”(Source: Tappytoon)

Kwon Nameun, a young script writer, recently finds herself caught in a career turn as well as romantic dilemma. As she reencounters her high school crush who mercilessly dumped her seven years ago, how is she supposed to face this adonis of an actor for whom she once set on the path of writing? She has to prove that she already let go. Luckily, she meets another cute, sweet and handsome singer, who offers her lunch-break jokes, late-night chats, and perhaps… a perfect reason… to let go. Is this fair? Can she really let go?

(Source: MangaToon)

Tae-U and Ji-Eun are friends—just friends. Both of them were comfortable with this arrangement, with neither holding any romantic feelings for the other. However, when Ji-Eun returns from summer break looking noticeably different, Tae-U’s feelings for his friend begin to change, and new feelings of jealousy and confusion taking their place. When Ji-Eun develops a crush on a handsome classmate, things start to get even more complicated between the two of them as Tae-U begins to try to beat out his new competitor and take his longtime friendship with Ji-Eun to the next level.(Source: WEBTOON, edited)

His blessing changed my life.

Kate knows full well that orphan girls don't get fairy tale endings. But when she saves the kidnapped daughter of Count Blanc, she's given the opportunity of a lifetime: becoming a maidservant at the Blanc Estate. There, she meets Alex, the cold but dashing heir whom she mistakes as a priest... (Source: Manta)

A temptation from which you can't escape...
What's a dress between to friends? Maybe a whole lot more than nothing!

Have you ever felt as if you are a protagonist of a fictional story? Then Ori's life could be called a cruel drama: the death of her parents, uncaring guardians, bullying in school, nervousness around people...
But as a matter of fact she is... an invented character in the truest sense of the word! And the author, who decides her future, is already writing a tragic finale! Only, ignorant Ori does not obey his will...Source: MU

At the end of a grueling day, a sudden pain struck—and I found myself transmigrated into the fantasy novel "Dark Header!" But out of all people… I became the depraved Seventh Prince, doomed to be miserably executed three years later?! From this point on, there’s only one goal: lie low until the original protagonist appears, and then quietly escape the empire. However, the events of the original story began unfolding far earlier than expected. As I move between the imperial palace and the slums... a covert effort to contain the fallout begins.(Source: Naver, translated)
The world collapsed and built underground city Sindorim. The boys who couldn't get there and survived, dig into the secrets of the underground city.(Source: Naver, translated)

The main character, who has a very bad life in real life, experiences a 180-degree shift in his circumstances after entering the virtual world of Bitworld. Manjae was actually paying a hefty price even if he was glad to have become the strongest and to have gained a lot of fame and fortune thanks to his unexpected weapon. What will happen to the protagonist in that compulsive struggle between power and guilt… Which decision will he make?

(Source: Kakao Webtoon, translated)

The story of a girl with a hereditary fate and a nine-tailed fox trying to break free from a thousand-year curse.

(Source: Naver, translated)
The story of a generation filled with romance and chaos.(Source: Naver, translated)

Antstudio brings you a collection of five stories that transcend time and space, with each one filled with more love and romance than the last. This collection takes you from a world of demons versus humans to a manor full of unexpected relationships and magical surprises. After that, it brings you to a "sew"lful grand empire and then to a humble sweet potato farm full of lonely longing. Finally, you return to the present day as you reminisce about past loves by "drawing" on happy memories. (Source: Tapas) 1. The Tyrant Princess Wants to Get Married (폭군 공주는 결혼이 하고 싶어!, Pokgun Gongjuneun Gyeolhoni Hago Sipeo!) [Somnip, Ppangyaui Nubeopja, Nubi] 2. Winter Magic at Nordfield Manor (노드필드의 겨울엔 마법이 있다, Nodeupildeu-ui Gyeouren Mabeobi Itda) [Yeongyeon & Se-Woon Jeong] 3. The Needlepoint Swordmaster (자수 놓는 소드마스터, Jasu Nonneun Sodeumaseuteo) [ Wolhet & Nubi] 4. The Field Warrior (밭 가는 용사, Ban Ganeun Yongsa) [Da-Da Lee,Ye-Seul Kang, Yu-Sin Kim, Shalom] 5.Chalkboard Doodle (칠판 낙서, Chilpan Nakseo) [Heung and Hong, Saejagga, Ha-Rim Jung]

title_en: I Created a Harem by Accident!
description:
In a hardcore adult novel full of wicked villains and frustrating situations, Selena Crawford is the female lead who suffers endlessly. When a nameless actress wakes up as Selena, she is determined to use her wit and acting skills to stay away from the male lead and change her fate. But as she struggles to do so, it seems that even more possible love interests are drawn to her. Can she cleverly avoid the male lead and kick out the villains? Or will she just end up in a bigger mess?

(Source: Tapas)

Promotional Manhwa for the novel. I now possess the body of Ophelia, the villainess in the story 'The Crown Prince Returns'. And just like the protagonists in the other reincarnated novels, I thought I would fare well. I died by getting guillotined the first time, the second time was getting my limbs torn apart, third was suicide by poison, and by the fourth time, I was struck with arrows atop the throne. And by the fifth restart, even if I tried to stray from the original storyline, I would still be doomed to die. "Concoct a poison for me. Not one that’s painful, but one that’ll kill me slowly." Therefore, this time, with all my heart and soul, I wished to die properly for once. "After I ascend the throne, are you leaving me behind?" "I sincerely hope that her highness survives, no matter what." "Your Highness, I wish to get to know you better." All these people surrounding aren't letting me die off easily!

Due to a halfhearted and immature decision made by her mother, Irie was set up to marry the son of her mother’s friend. This all began starting when she was 5 years old. She and the boy grew up together until Kangee moved overseas due to his father’s job. After 10 years, Irie and Kangee are reunited when they are 22 and 18, respectively. Can they be a good match for each other despite the four-year age gap and their strikingly different personalities, tastes, and ways of thinking?

title_en: I'm a Villainess, but I Won't Live Like One
description: Bianca is just another noble lady with a simple dream: to marry into a dukedom and enjoy a life of luxury. But everything changes when she stumbles upon a book—one that casts her as the villainess, doomed to stand in the way of her real-life fiancé’s love story with a commoner girl. As Bianca realizes the book accurately depicts her own fate, she refuses to accept her tragic ending. Can she rewrite her story, or is she simply destined to become a villainess?(Source: WEBTOONS)

title_en: The Duke's Family Is Not My Problem
description:
After being cast out as a child over suspicions of illegitimacy, Perrianne was adopted by the queen of the neighboring kingdom and has been her loyal spy ever since. She's very happy with her new life when she suddenly hears perplexing news: Duke Exer's long-lost daughter has finally returned... except that's supposed to be her! Tasked with unmasking the imposter posing as herself, she's determined to just get the job done and get out of there. But will her family let her go so easily this time?

(Source: Tapas)

Despite being born as the daughter of a nanny, I considered myself blessed. With my loving mother, caring masters, and their three children, I couldn’t have asked for a better life.

However, this all changed during the year my mother and masters died of a plague. That was when I remembered who I was before this life.

Somehow, I was reincarnated as a side character of an angsty reverse harem romance novel. The problem was that I was the final boss in this novel, the queen of snakes who uses the young masters, the future main villains, to send the Empire to ruin.

I knew what I wanted to protect, at all costs.

After his brutal death at the sword of a rival head merchant, Seoho Eun finds he’s been given a new opportunity when he reawakens in his younger body, decades earlier! Now armed with years of learned wisdom and first-hand knowledge of future events, the young master is determined to use this chance to right his wrongs, make better choices, and give himself, his guild, and especially his family, everything they deserve!(Source: Tapas)

title_en: My Second Life is a Healing Life?
description: Eugene Pellivia, the youngest son of a legendary warrior family, is on the brink of death—until he’s visited by Pellin, the fabled Mage of Creation, and given a second chance at life. Determined to follow in the footsteps of the one who saved him, Eugene sets out to become a great mage and use his powers for good. But fate has other plans, and before long, he's drawn into the shadows of a darker world...(Source: WEBTOON)

Taking lunch orders and cleaning up after your coworkers is all part of the rookie experience. But Jieun takes it all in stride, and as the newcomer at Rendezvous Cosmetics, she’s excited just to learn the ropes while earning a modest wage. But this office is far from sunshine and rainbows, and the company’s president, Ma Seongjun, is a venomous terror within its walls. After she makes a mortifying love confession in his presence, Jieun is caught in Mr. Ma’s web of torture. But that confession wasn’t meant for him! It was for her true love--Mr. Kang from the department over! Unfortunately for Jieun, there’s no turning back once the boss sets his sights on her. Will Mr. Ma eventually sink his fangs into Jieun? Or is there actually a gentle soul hidden underneath her boss’s cruel exterior?

(Source: TappyToon)

To Blanche, everything seemed hopeless. Until she realized it was all a game. One she made, to be exact. Now she has a goal: Become the villain's right-hand man! But wait. Why is she the one saving him...?

(Source: POCKET COMICS)

Elena Taylor, the former villainess of a romance story, has decided to walk away from the main story and open a Romance Counselling business. As an independent woman trying to find her footing in society with her fledgling venture, she is given the hardest request she’s ever encountered: help the sub-lead of the main plot, Hugh Godwin, debut in High-Society and get married, or get kicked out of the building she lives and works out of! Elena soon realizes that she’s in trouble when she meets Hugh, a burly, muscular bear of a knight who’s been burned by love. Will Elena be able to convince Hugh to find romance and keep her business running?

(Source: WEBTOON)

One day, a girl awakens as 6-year-old St. Priscilla, the heroine of her most cherished novel. The catch? She is destined to suffer with an abusive adoptive family! To avoid this, she adopts her ultimate bias, the ruthless Emperor Melkiades, as her father instead. Although spending her days fangirling and redeeming her bias's tarnished name seems like a dream come true, with so many foes still lurking in the shadows, can this young saint protect Melkiades and find happiness for them both?

(Source: Tapas)

Choose your player: a noble hero intent on saving the world, or a devious demon prince hell-bent on conquering it? A normal choice when playing a new game, but when gaming nerd In-gong Ju wakes up inside the VR game Knight Saga:RE, he finds himself playing as Siutra, a tiny, gnome-like ninth prince of the demon kingdom. In-gong must work quickly to unlock a range of potentially overpowered skills to help him level up and win over his siblings before the Day of Massacres, when they’ll all be slaughtered by the game’s antagonist, Zephyr Ragnaroth.(Source: WEBTOON)

title_en: Trapped in a Game That Flopped
description:
Apothecary Shari Azrael's life turns upside down when she suddenly realizes she's actually an administrator trapped in the RPG game "Save the Earth." Her only shot at returning to reality before her real body expires is to finish the game... which could've been possible were it not for the fact that "Save the Earth" is notoriously difficult in every single way! Can Shari successfully manage to use the perks of knowing the plot and gameplay to reach the ending before her time runs out? 

(Source: Tapas)

Following the death of the World Tree, all that stands between the apocalypse and salvation is the Divine Maiden, prophesied to restore peace and prosperity. But never mind all that. Princess Teriella Rufeon has more pressing issues at hand: her family keeps trying to kill her, she’s got a secret healing power to keep under wraps, and she’s just found out she’s being sent off to marry the infamous tyrant Emperor Rivanfel von Leonharta! But there’s more to Rivanfel than meets the eye, and Teriella discovers she isn’t the only one with a grave secret to hide…
(Source: WEBTOONS)

title_en: Baby Prisoner of the Winter Castle
description:
The last survivor of the Grezekaiah royal family is biding her time as a prisoner waiting to die… too bad everyone finds her absolutely adorable. When Clarisse became the youngest prisoner of Duke Maximilian Sheridan, she never expected her captors to be the family she’d always wished for. With an execution date set for her eighteenth birthday, will her emerging powers, bubbly personality, and cute face save her from her fate?

(Source: Tapas)

After meeting terrible ends in her first two lives, Vivielle Andante didn't have high hopes for her third. Luckily, she's reborn as a wealthy duke's daughter this time. The catch? The kingdom is quite literally crumbling due to the lack of architects. Vivielle may still be a child, but she has lifetimes' worth of training as an architect stored in her brain! If she rolls up her sleeves and gets to work, can she lay a strong foundation for her future and build back up hope in the kingdom?

(Source: Tapas)

After being reincarnated as the villainess of a novel, Yurina is determined to escape her fate of being killed by the story’s second male lead. Her solution? Save his life and get him on her side before he falls in love with the female lead! Her recollection of the story is spotty, but after months of searching, Yurina finally finds him-- or so she thinks. He’s a bit different from what she expected, but that’s probably because of her poor memory... Her plan should still work, right?

(Source: Tapas)

Adel always wanted a family to love her, and she may be close to getting her wish. Upon realizing she’s the Child of Prophecy destined to lead the empire, Duke Aizen adopts Adel—but only for a month! Given an uncertain future, Adel tries to win over the hearts of as many of her found family as she can: her reserved adoptive father, the reluctant maid, even the colorful group that makes up her guards. Will it take more than being good (and eating those yucky bell peppers) to stay in this castle she now considers home?

(Source: Tapas)

title_en: Rookie Chef with the Magic Touch
description:
Seonghoon Kang has been the cook’s helper at Jewelria, a third-rate hotel, for years, causing his self-esteem to plummet lower than his standing in the kitchen. However, he has a secret that makes him a cut above the rest… he can see the “memory” of an ingredient with just one touch! The sear of the kitchen may scorch the meek, but can this rookie chef survive the heat and prevail over the grueling struggles of life? Or should he just get out of the kitchen for good?
(Source: Tapas)

One day, I suddenly became the protagonist of a game. However, the more you look at this protagonist... the more you'll sigh. He's got the worst stats, the worst talent and zero connections. But still… You have acquired [Heavenly Martial Physique]. You have become the master of the [Martial God's Tome]. “So what? I’m the ultimate veteran player!” He's not just a veteran player— he’s a full-blown obsessive maniac. Thus begins the legendary playthrough of a hardcore veteran!(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

After getting pulled into a novel, Leann lives her life as a priestess in a temple, while healing people who are tangled up in red strings. The red string is a death flag that slowly ruins the body and brings you closer to death. And other than the main protagonist, Leann is the only one who can see and remove them.
But when she heals an injured man on the street, the red string of fate connects the two of them together, and there is no way of removing it! To make matters worse, the man she is connected to happens to be the worst villain in the novel, Abell! Can she escape from him and live a peaceful life without hindering the original story of the novel?

(Source: Tappytoon)

In an effort to escape the power struggle within the Heavenly Demon Sect, the protagonist Myeong-Un retreats to a life of seclusion. However, simply avoiding ambition for the throne is not enough to avert tragedy. Myeong-Un flees from the sect leader Myeong-Gak, who seeks fratricide, before meeting his demise. At the moment of his death, as his consciousness fades, he hears a voice. "Do you regret it? Do you wish to fight again?"" To his surprise, Myeong-Un, believed to be dead, opens his eyes once more....(Source: WEBTOON)

A world full of zombies. But this apocalypse... is it worth trying?! Mental care, wooden construction, heavenly magic, animal communication, mechanical engineering, performance, etc... There is so much to learn! 

The sprint of the prepared survivor, who is good at everything, begins!

(Source: Naver, translated)

Emilia is reborn in a romance game as the jealous friend of Ophelia Windrose. Knowing that Ophelia will die young, Emilia chooses to love her, and the two grow as close as sisters. After her friend's death, Emilia departs to live a quiet life. The three male love interests are supposed to use the loss to connect to Ophelia's replacement. But instead of pursuing her, they all seem more interested in Emilia! Can Emilia navigate their newfound desire, or will she always be in Ophelia's shadow?

(Source: Tapas)

Jong-U Yun is a young man in his 20s who moves to Seoul and rents a cheap room in a run-down building because he is low on money. The place is dilapidated and the residents are creepy, but Jong-U decides to stay until he has enough money to move elsewhere. However, when mysterious events occur, Jong-U realizes that the residents may be more suspicious than they seemed.

(Sources: WEBTOON, edited)

Rising stars and longtime childhood friends, So Dakyung and Ji Minwoo. The scandalous open 'business relationship' is rapidly evolving to 'marriage'! But somewhere in this whole marriage, is something a little suspicious. "Before the summer you turn 29, you must succeed in marrying So Dakyung." What kind of story did he have with his old note? (Source: Naver, translated) Note: The chapter count includes 3 side stories.

The transfer student Ye-Bom was jealous of Eun-Ho, an honor student everyone liked. Many years later, Ye-Bom’s life feels hopeless and bleak when one day, she finally learns about the reason behind Eun-Ho’s death that occurred a long time ago. Ye-Bom, filled with regret, returns to the time when she was 18 and faces him once again. What drove the seemingly perfect boy to death? Ye-Bom is finally ready to hear Eun-Ho’s story. (Source: WEBTOONS) Note: This series contains themes regarding suicide and bullying that may not be suitable for all readers. Viewer discretion is advised.

The protagonist, Na Seon-Uk, was born with the heart of a tiger. He was a troublemaker, but at the request of his parents, he hid his strength and transferred to Gukyang High School, located in a remote area that he thought would be quiet. However, it was a place where various old-fashioned cultures and dangerous people gathered. Seon-Uk, who wanted to graduate quietly,  couldn’t help but feel his hot blood and began educating people!

(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

A story about a man with a disease where he dies if he doesn't kiss, and the secret kissing contract made in order to keep him alive; an office contract romance.

(Source: Hour of Lunacy)

What if you were fated to be murdered in every life? Living in a small countryside town, No-Gyung Lee thinks her biggest problem is her unrequited crush on her childhood friend. But No-Gyung is cursed destined to be slain by the same villagers every time she's reborn. With no memories of her previous lives, she must unravel the mysteries of her village and the legends surrounding it in order to stay alive. Can No-Gyung finally break the curse or is she fated to relive this tragedy forever?

(Source: Tapas)

Ortez, first daughter of Duke Tesa, marries someone she’s never even seen before. An exciting love story that starts with an arranged marriage!

(Source: Copin Comics)

title_en: My Little Groom, Even After I'm Gone
description: Despite being bound by a political marriage, Livenia and Heinrich form a bond and slowly become the family neither of them ever had. That is, until Livenia’s sudden death tears them apart. After being reborn into a new body, she vows to shed the cruel judgment she faced as a young duchess, but seeing Heinrich still trapped in the shadow of her death even 10 years later shakes her resolve. Will she embrace her new life or return to her former groom's side to keep the promise she once made?(Source: Tapas)

I reincarnated as the wife of a cursed archduke in my own twisted novel. As the author, I took responsibility and set things right by lifting the curse, which was the key to returning home. I thought my job was done, and just when I was finally trying to go back, the archduke asked me, "Did you really think I wouldn't know that you’re planning on returning to your fiance?". He had completely misunderstood! "Whether you like it or not, I'm still your husband. I'm never letting you go back to that bastard." All I want is for him to please let me go home!

Have you ever wished you were special? Se-Gye Lee certainly doesn’t! She wants nothing more than to be ordinary, but her extraordinary strength keeps landing her in hot water, like the time she accidentally knocked down the wall separating her home from her neighbor’s. Her good-looking neighbor, Ju-Won, is surprisingly nice about it, but he has secrets of his own. Then Yeong, who granted Se-Gye her powers, comes back into her life. Se-Gye asks him to make her normal again, but why does it seem like her life’s about to become much less ordinary?(Source: WEBTOONS)

As the deadliest assassin in the Seong Empire, Yeseo is stumped by very few jobs that come her way. But when Emperor Ahon hires her to find the spy hiding in his palace, she must also play the part of his new airheaded concubine as a cover. It takes all her patience to keep up her lovey-dovey act with Ahon during the day, and all her smarts to sniff out the enemy at night. If only she could wrap up this job quickly and collect her handsome reward-- but with so many suspicious officials and the tangled web of alliances inside the court, it's hard to tell who the true culprit could be. Can Yeseo catch this mysterious spy before she loses her sanity and blows her own cover?
(Source: Tappytoon)

A world stained black. Driven by the Black Witch, humanity is forced into a vast city where light and color converge. To reclaim the world, humanity continues its pioneering efforts, and a boy named Kay aspires to join the expeditionary force. But he’s rejected because he is colorless, lacking any hue. Then one day, through an unexpected incident, Kay gains the color black....(Source: Naver, translated)

Not only is Charlotte becoming stronger, but Charlie is also changing...Each of them are missing something the other has... But will they be able to help each other out?

(Source: Toomics)

A 19 year old girl with a rare growth disorder that leaves her in the body of a small child meets a boy with a mental disorder, who has the mind of a small boy in a 17 year old's body. A Friendly Winter shares with us the endearing story of their day-to-day lives, joys and tribulations.
Summoned creatures have ranks, from the lowest F-rank to the highest S-rank... but something’s strange. “Why is my summon EX-rank?”(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

"To stay alive… I have no choice but to become a genius. I’ll do my best starting today, so please support me." Lee Hyun-Woo finds himself possessing Kyle Seltarion, an extra character from a game where he used to reign as the world’s number-one player. Considering the game’s storyline, he soon faces the imminent death of Kyle, who, on top of being on death's door, can't use magic or aura and has a terrible reputation. How did he end up in the body of such a character? However, after discovering a new talent, he learns to harness mana and begins to shift his attributes and reputation with knowledge of hidden routes gained through grinding in the game. His immediate goal is to save his own life, but that goal is closely linked to the impending global catastrophe... To overcome this situation, he needs to gather allies and boost his reputation! It's time to turn his past, which was a reckless mess, around and move into a new phase! (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

After a once-dormant contract requiring descendants of House Morgana and House Kalakis to wed resurfaces, Meivia Morgana receives a shoddy proposal from the ever-miserable eldest son, Gilbert Kalakis. Determined not to settle for less, Meivia decides to marry the single and mysteriously alluring family head, Grand Duke Edis Kalakis. Between a volatile son always knocking at her door and an enticingly enigmatic father who leaves her wanting more, will Meivia be able to sign her way to happiness?

(Source: Tapas)

An argument, a fall, and a lie. Determined to save her loveless marriage, Yeonhwa impulsively fakes memory loss to buy herself some time. After all, who would insist on divorcing someone with a brain injury? But now, not only is her ice-cold husband suddenly warm and caring, he’s telling her that they’ve always shared a bed -- even though she knows they’ve never even kissed! How long can she hold him at bay? Does she even want to? And maybe more to the point, who’s playing who, here?

(Source: WEBTOON)

Eulji So Moon has aged well and is now a grandfather. He orders his mischievous grandson to go on a joyful trip to Zhongyuan! To save the fallen Namgung family clan and help them spread their wings once more, Eulji Ho’s journey starts now!!(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

Every person in this world changes, it could be anything like their desires or personalities. What if behind a person smiles hides a dark malice or depression? How will someone react to it if that person had the ability to see their hidden façade? This is the story of a girl who can see the ever changing form of humanity as she dives into the mysterious realms of the unknown and real life.

[Unique Trait ‘Skill Master (EX)’ has been activated.] ▶ ‘Skill Copy (EX)’ is now enabled. “Whoa… your skill’s insane!” [Skill has been copied.] From now on, there’s no skill he can’t have. Yours is mine. Mine? Still mine. The rise of the ultimate cheat-class protagonist begins now. All Skill Master Yoo Ju-yeon’s explosive saga is just getting started!(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

Wait, why are you in love with me?!

An office worker is reincarnated as Elena, the villainess of a romantasy novel. Aware of what fate awaits her, she rejects the male lead's offer to become his lover and thinks herself safe from trouble. That is, until she discovers that she has unwittingly charmed the male lead's younger brother!

(Source: Manta)

title_en: The Runaway Lead Lives Next Door
description: Seina Rohill is a D-class hunter making a living off of killing monstrous fiends—or so she thought. In actuality, she's become an insignificant character in the novel, A Secret in the Flower Shop. What's more, she happens to be neighbors with the female lead, Ellen Euclis! The story revolves around Ellen receiving daily love confessions until she meets the male lead. But when Seina encounters a side character named Dion Fravel, who seemingly has a deep connection to Ellen, she's determined to make him Ellen's endgame. Unfortunately, Seina also has to deal with Duke Rashad Carlman, who appears to be the strongest candidate as the original male lead. As these four characters' paths cross, who truly will be the protagonists of this tale? And what could the "secret" mentioned in the novel's title be?(Source: Tappytoon)

The beautiful goddess of fortune hidden by a rich man came into the life of the poor and unlucky me.

Note: Includes prologue and 10 epilogue chapters.

Yunjo is a young prince who has always served his kingdom from behind the scenes. He’s spent his whole life in the shadow of his brother, the crown prince Yigang, fighting enemies and winning wars in his name. All that changes when one day, he meets Seolyun, a mysterious and charming woman who captivates him instantly. What happens when a man emerges from the shadows to follow his heart? Can he overcome all of the obstacles in his way to step into the light and be with the one he loves? (Source: WEBTOONS) Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

Getting dumped is harder than it looks! I-Na has the world's grumpiest neighbor, Geon-Ho. The love letter meant for his brother Ju-Hyeong somehow finds its way to Geon-Ho instead! Before she can fix her mistake, he accepts her confession! I-Na tries everything possible to get dumped by Geon-Ho, but it seems he has a different game plan altogether!

(Source: Manta, edited)

Hari Jeon is a high school student with a heart condition. One day, she is struck by a curse that causes her to zap everything and everyone around her whenever her heart races for Jeong-won, her secret crush. Yura Baek, a brash and sharp-tongued classmate who mysteriously knows about her curse, offers her a deal—he’ll help her keep it under control if she lets him use it. Can Hari find the courage to confess her feelings to her crush? Or will she stay in the safe zone of friendship? Get ready for Hari’s electrifying first love story! 

(Source: WEBTOON)

Cheongha Kim, a legendary swordswoman from the Joseon era, awakens centuries later in the body of Dajin Park, a quiet high school student. Armed with deadly combat skills, Cheongha must face school bullies, navigate the chaos of modern-day life, and find her place in a world far different from her own. The halls of Juwon High are about to meet a warrior unlike any they’ve seen before.

(Source: WEBTOON)

title_en: I Tamed the Male Lead Who Tried to Kill Me
description:
Latia's family took in Karshian when his father went on a maritime expedition, but after rumors go around that he's dead, they treat him like a parasite. Egged on by her sadistic parents and desperate for their approval, Latia bullies Karshian relentlessly. However, when Karshian's father returns as a national hero and powerful duke, Karshian gets his revenge by executing Latia's entire family! As she recalls her last moments, she realizes that her family had been lying to her all along. So when she's thrown back into the past, she's determined to prevent her death and treat Karshian right this time. But this won't be easy when Karshian distrusts Latia's every move. Will Latia be able to win over Karshian and turn the tables on her family this time around, or is she doomed to die once more?(Source: Tappytoon)
Note: Chapter count includes prologue.

Princess Canola arrives in wintery Tripol expecting a warm welcome from her future husband, Edel, and his kingdom. It's love at first sight the moment she lays eyes on him. But her picture-perfect fantasy comes crashing down when the people of Tripol reject an outlander for their prince. Now, Canola has to jump through hoops just to remain in Edel's orbit. Most would crumble under the pressure, but Canola isn't about to miss her chance to land herself a dreamy husband. She just has to find a way to melt prince charming's heart, and all the icy hearts in Tripol.

(Source: Tappytoon)

Once reviled as the wicked magician Hailey, the most hated woman in the realm, she was cast into a poisoned wasteland to die. But death never came. A year later, she’s alive and farming, bickering with a tree fairy, and somehow the new Marchioness Maron. As secrets of the contamination zone begin to surface and the ghosts of her past return, Hailey must decide whether to seek vengeance or build something new from ruins. When survival itself becomes the greatest twist of fate, who needs revenge?(Source: Tapas)
What happens when the scariest kid in school asks you out on a date? Yoojung struggles to survive what may just be the worst day of her life. (Source: YLAB) Note: Belongs to Blue String universe.

"If you were a girl, we would never have met"
"Well- to...to be honest with you- I AM a girl-"
Plain when she's a girl, but disguised as a guy, she's got a good body, is awesome at fighting and has a handsome face.
Despite thinking that Ida is a guy, Kang Naru falls in love with her.
Now everyone thinks that Naru is gay, Ida wants to tell him the truth.
"What should I do? If they know I'm a girl - "
- But at what cost...?

What would you do for $500k? As a struggling actress, I agreed to play the part of Doting Fiancée to Jeekyung Lee, a charming, handsome heir to a Korean conglomerate—the perfect husband! Except, he’s gay. Eh, it’s fine! The only problem is... (cue ominous music) Jeehan, Jeekyung’s younger brother. That jerk may have the looks of a leading man, but he’s determined to show I’m the wrong girl for Jeekyung! It’s gonna take the performance of my life to win him over. Hah! I’m ready for my Oscar!

(Source: Tapas)

title_en: Himeul Sumgigo Jeulgineun Pyeonghwaroun Hanyeo Saenghwal

description: The world is being assimilated by a crazy religion, and to stop it I have become their satan. The religion is controlled by aliens, and people don’t have a clue. The world says that aliens don’t exist, but they are everywhere. How am so I certain? Because I am also an alien.

As a professor of English Literature, strict but capable I-Hyeon is both admired and feared by his students. He's surprised to discover his love for poetry is shared by one of them, the quiet yet arresting Nam-U. Drawn to her despite a painful past, can their love remain strong when faced with the new challenges that lie ahead...? 

(Source: Tappytoon, edited)

Ever since that fateful rainy day when she was rescued by the handsome Duke Killian Devonshire, Rowena has lived as his mistress. Though she believes that Killian has grown to love her over the past three years, she wants to repay her debt to him and become his equal so that she can stand proudly by his side. But when Killian begins to behave strangely, her trust in him wavers, only for it to be fully broken the day he introduces another woman to be his future wife. Thus, Rowena decides to make some drastic changes to their relationship. But will it be for better or for worse?(Source: Tappytoon)

“Dark World,” the game I, a thirty-year-old salaryman, had devoted my entire youth to. 
 
“What the fuck is this…”
 
When I opened my eyes, Dark World had become my reality. The pouring rain, dripping hot blood, and a cold blade. At the moment of my impending death, I came into this familiar world.

(Source: Kakaopage, translated)

From the high seas to high society.

When the infamous pirate Rosetta gets poisoned to death, she wakes up in the body of noble lady Leah. Now, to avoid a second death, Rosetta must play the part of a noble and... get engaged?! But to whom? Could it be to the strange admiral who has suddenly come chasing after "Rosetta"?

(Source: Manta)

College student Hadam desperately needs a recommendation letter from her professor. The only way to get it? Be a mentor to an exchange student and house them for a full semester. Hadam was expecting a female, but the exchange student turns out to be… a handsome French male?! What will happen when Hadam has to live with him under the same roof? Will they be able to overcome the language barrier to find love?

(Source: Manta)

Will you still love me once you know my secret?

Angie enjoys an idyllic life of reading and embroidering on Cullinan Island. But everything changes when she's selected as the companion to Kylek, the enigmatic heir of House Blackwell. As their bond grows, extraordinary events unfold, unraveling Cullinan Island's long-kept secret.

(Source: Manta)

Dongbang-Mui, Son of The Deadly King, Dongbang-Go Jin who is called The War God. In the secret of his birth, he followed in his grandfather’s footsteps and became the lower rank guard of The Murim League. Together with the bounty hunter’s Ruthless Slashing Sword, The World Best Assassin’s Snake Fang Sword made of The Snake Poisonous Sharp Fang, and inside the love of Bicheonri- Ya Eul who possessed the Plum Flying Sword, he lifted his Blade of Wind and Thunder to the world.(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

Lia, a penguin-turned-human, hides her anthropomorphic self from her dad for fear of abandonment and hatred. Fleeing her home, she’s discovered by Souradel—a killer whale anthro with a thing for penguins. His obsession with her fluffy belly leads to wild misunderstandings, mistaken kisses, and hilariously tense encounters. Now, Lia must dodge his affections while keeping her identity secret.
(Source: Tapas)

title_en: Lady Solea Just Wants to Go Home
description:
Lady Solea's family can't figure out how she lost her memories or why she keeps raving about her "jackpot." They don't realize she's actually Yoon Jiyoon, a lottery winner who was suddenly brought into their world! Determined to return to her reality and claim her riches, Jiyoon sets off a series of shenanigans to send herself home. Yet when Solea's family proves more fun than expected and distracts her from the mission to leave, Jiyoon begins to wonder if family is worth more than a fortune...

(Source: Tapas)

Jun Yu, a WBA lightweight champion, gets dumped by his girlfriend, then gets hit by a car… and wakes up in a dating simulation game as Yu-Jun Russell, the adopted DAUGHTER of a noble family! The game tells Jun that he can be reincarnated, but only after playing to win over the love of his target characters. Determined to see his ex-girlfriend again, he eagerly accepts the challenge. Will Jun be successful in winning the hearts of his suitors, and manage to return to the world he came from?

(Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title_en: My Sweetheart Duke Has a Secret
description:
Noel—the adopted anthropomorphic daughter of the Miceria family—is abused and neglected by everyone after her mother passes away from an accident. Alone and grief-stricken, her only source of comfort is her secret wizard friend Sion.

But when Noel accidentally hears about her step-father's horrific plan, she begs Sion to help her escape the Miceria household. Turns out that Sion is a magical duke who can easily get rid of people in the blink of an eye! Sion then offers Noel to work for him as his assistant. Is this an offer of a lifetime, or a trap? What is Sion planning to do with Noel?

(Source: POCKET COMICS)

When Han Ina wakes up as game villainess Tulia Frasier, with absolutely trash stats and a garbage personality, a status window tells her she must reach Rank A or die. Determined to succeed, she starts making strategic moves, striving to gain the recognition of her grandfather, the grand duke, and earn the affection of the male leads in order to rank up and ensure her survival. But with members of her own family plotting to take her out, can Tulia clean up her act before it's too late?(Source: Tapas)

“What's the point of being a Sword God in a past life?” I don't know why, but I remembered my past life when I was a child. Could that be the reason I really enjoyed the virtual reality games I happened to play? However, a congenital issue eventually prevented me from accessing virtual reality, and it took seven years for a solution to finally appear. “The capsule costs one hundred million won.” That's expensive. “Actually, have you heard of LEOS?” League of Streaming? A streamer tournament? Why bring that up? “The grand prize there is this very capsule. What do you think? Do you want to give it a shot?”(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

No more unrequited love! The hottest rumor in Going High School is that if you put money in the old clothes collection bin and shout out your favorite person's name, it will tell you how the other person feels...!
Song A-Ram, who is only interested in grades and money instead of dating, is not swayed by such rumors. Then Jeong Jin-U, a popular guy at school, suddenly enters A-Ram's daily life. Now what is she supposed to do with a guy who doesn't know where he's going?
(Source: Naver, translated)

On her way back home late one night, office worker Sophie stumbles into another world where she's a princess?! Well that's what Alan, prince of the Lapis Kingdom, says. To return to her world she must fulfill the prophecy and help Alan become king. Sophie agrees but...amidst a war for the crown, can she survive?

(Source: Tapas)
Korean scrapper representative, Kang Sung-Jae. He has an opportunity to become a legendary cook!(Source: Naver, translated)

As a rabbit who lost her baby to a tiger, Myo-Ryeong is infuriated by the cruel ways of the jungle. She delves into spiritual training to become divine and create an ideal world, but her resolve weakens with time. Just when she's settled for the status quo, the god she serves sends her down to earth with an impossible quest: finding the "udumbara," a mythical flower that will save the human world. Her partner is none other than Han-Ho, the very tiger responsible for her baby's death! Will the two enemies set aside their past conflict and rescue humanity?(Source: WEBTOON)

Jang Yeon-jae, a drama assistant writer for 6 years, desperately wanted and tried to be a main writer, but ahead of his debut, his teacher the main writer Kim Tae-jin stole his script. "Sir! How could you do this! That's my script!” “Yeon-jae. It is true that I was a little influenced by your ideas. But that is definitely my work.” After leaving the assistant writer job out of anger, he looked for a way to knock Kim Tae-jin down, but there seemed to be no hope. But at that moment... A miracle happened.
