Kasia Del Roman is a soldier crafted to become an assassin. She lost her human emotions long ago and lived her life as a simple tool, just to be thrown away in her final moments. She couldn’t even die a proper death as she opened her eyes to a battlefield of a different world. Will she live the same life she did in her original world?

(Source: Pocket Comics)

title_en: A Tender Heart: The Story of How I Became a Duke's Maid
description: Liandro was stricken with a hideous curse at a young age, shunned by his family and rejected by the only people he ever loved. As the supporting character in a novel, he’s doomed to a role of misery and loneliness. That is, until a sympathetic reader is suddenly transported into this fictional world as his lowly maid, determined to change his fate! Can Evelina break Liandro free of his wretched destiny and help him find true love after all?(Source: Tappytoon) Note: Includes eight extra chapters.

In a twist of fate, the life of a doctor of Korean medicine flips upside down in a single night. Doctor Han Lee is reborn as Lachiel, the sickly Crown Prince of the Empire of Magentano. Han is now armed with medical knowledge and skills found nowhere else in this new world -- but can he heal an empire and mend his own body at the same time? Witness his journey of self-exploration and resilience as he maps destiny's meridian, in pursuit of the acupoint that can reverse his fate.(Source: WEBTOON)

Jung Hyunwoo is just an unlucky gamer barely making ends meet in the VR game "God Wars." He even ends up losing access to his game account due to a horrible accident and is forced to create a new character. In the process, he discovers that he has an ability that allows him to see hidden information in the game, which leads him to become a Grand Warlock. Now equipped with a mind-blowing skill and a legendary class, all that's left is for him to level up and go from zero to hero...

(Source: Tapas)

A hero should never kill anyone, not even the worst of villains. Gangyu could never understand why his team of heroes lived by those words, but he tried his best to do the same… until the villain who wiped out his squad killed his brother in prison. Gangyu breaks his vow and enters Ruculus with permission to kill as the prison’s executioner. Now, he must fight his way through the villains to kill the worst of them all.

(Source: WEBTOON)

title_en: From a Knight to a Lady
description: When Estelle meets her untimely death, she is a valiant knight of the Kingdom of Ersha. But death is not the end for Estelle - four years after her demise, she finds herself reincarnated in the body of Lucifela Aydin, the spoiled and cold-hearted daughter of a count in the Empire of Jansgar. To her dismay, she finds that her country fell to Jansgar years ago, and that she is now betrothed to Zedekiah Heint, the son of a count and her adversary in her previous life. Can Estelle discover the truth behind her death while attempting to navigate her new life as Lucifela? (Source: Tappytoon) Note: Includes 14 extra chapters.

Princess Enisha’s birth marks the start of the Hyperion Empire’s prophetic reign. With her unfathomably cute face and a ceaseless supply of loyal servants, life is pretty great for the baby princess. There’s just the small issue of her two psychotic-killer brothers and a war-hungry father who she must stop from driving the empire into ruin. Enisha’s got a lot on her plate, between the constant flood of assassins trying to kill her and those pesky memories of her past life. But she’s in no rush to return to being the powerful high mage of a magical kingdom. After all, being Hyperion’s one great hope certainly has its royal perks. It’s not easy being the empire’s beloved princess, but these subjects will just have to do. (Source: Tappytoon) Note: Chapter count includes 30 side stories.

Infamous jailbreaker Rosen Walker is finally being transferred to the Isle of Monte, the most notorious maximum security prison in the world. Her guard? It’s none other than the beloved war hero of the empire himself — Ian Connor. Now Ian must unravel the truth. Did Rosen really commit the murder? Or is there more to the story?

(Source: Manta)

A lifetime as a fencing prodigy prepared Eunha for her new role as Selena Evan, novel side character and daughter of a renowned swordsman. Life isn't actually so bad after being sucked into a fictional world, but she’s doomed to meet an untimely death if she can't escape the clutches of the villainous Prince Ignus. When Selena's twin brother, Celestine, runs away before his military conscription, she has no choice but to enlist under his name to avoid getting her entire family executed. But hiding her identity won’t be so easy once Ignus takes note of her impressive sword skills and sets his sights on turning “Sir Celestine” into his top henchman. With the threat of execution looming over her head, can Selena avoid getting caught by the villain? (Source: Tappytoon) Note: Includes two extra chapters.

Kill monsters, save your neighbors, and expand your domain, all from the comfort of your couch. When his city becomes infested with monsters, Jae-Hyeon discovers an ability that makes him the absolute master of his apartment building. But his ability comes with a catch -- he cannot leave his apartment. Now, he must arm his neighbors and lead them beyond their building to survive the post-apocalyptic world they find themselves in.(Source: WEBTOON)

title_en: The Siren: Becoming the Villain's Family
description:
“If there is a next life, I will save you.” Aria is the last remaining siren, a monster who bewitches humans with song. Shackled, she is forced to sing to nobles until she coughs blood. By the time the demonized Grand Duke Lloyd Valentine frees her, it’s too late. She has already breathed her last… or so she thinks. When she awakens in the past, Aria dedicates her life to protecting the duke, but she wonders if that’s really all her life is worth. Will she ever be free? Or is this siren destined to sing the same song forever?


(Source: Tapas)

When a down-on-her-luck student runs out of money – and hope – it’s time for the devil to make his entrance and give her an offer she can’t refuse. But this devil has problems of his own. He’s a cog in Satan’s corporate ladder, who’s quickly losing credibility because that same desperate girl isn’t ready to part with her soul willingly. Now, she’s working at his coffee shop while he tries to convince her that she can have it all. And the cost? Merely her mortal soul…
(Source: WEBTOON)

title_en: Destined To Be Loved by the Villains
description: After a night of playing "Savior Rising," Daud Campbell wakes up in the game as an unimpressive minor character. Despite his plans to lay low and avoid trouble, he runs into both the final boss and the main hero on his first day at the game's academy. As Daud struggles to make it through the game, he only seems to attract more danger, including the attention of evil characters. Will the love of these powerful villains help Daud survive till the end? Or are they just too wicked for his own good? (Source: Tapas) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

While Se-Jun Im settles things with his fists, his best friend, Ha-Jin Seo, eats and breathes grappling. Together, they fend off bullies on their school campus, but everything changes after a fight that sets Se-Jun on a mission to hold those responsible accountable for their crimes. What began as a schoolroom brawl quickly turns into a fight for justice and truth as Se-Jun hits the streets looking for any leads as to what happened on that fateful day.(Source: Tapas) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

This is not a fairytale. No, this is a story of what lurks beyond the “happily ever after.” Once upon a time, Elena assumed the role of Princess Veronica, married the crown prince, and lived happily... until her dutiful knight plunged his sword into her back and the true Veronica stepped out of the darkness. Now, Elena finds herself at the beginning of her cautionary tale. However, this time she intends to do more than play the star of the show. This time, Elena will direct the downfall of everyone who played a part in wronging her.

(Source: Tapas)

title_en: A Dance of Swords in the Night
description: Kidnapped as a child to be trained in the art of poison, So-Han Jin returns to his hometown in search of the group of New Moon Sword Dancers who raised him. However, upon his return, So-Han discovers the sword dancers have been defeated by a nefarious sect that now rules the area, with some members having been abducted. What would have been a heartwarming reunion transforms into a quest for revenge as So-Han begins his search for the remaining sword dancers, and he’s willing to poison anyone who gets in his way.(Source: WEBTOON, edited)

Did you just imprint with me?!
After dying from overwork, Noa ends up possessing the body of Eleanora, the villainess from a novel. Noa simply wants to lead a peaceful life and tries not to interfere with the original story. That is, until a baby dragon that's meant to imprint with the heroine imprints with her instead...

(Source: Manta)

title_en: Ice Lamp - The Chronicles of Kira
description:
Life in a war-torn empire isn’t easy for a girl. That’s why Kira was raised and educated by her mother as a boy. But when her mother passes away, Kira is left to make her own way in the world, and the older she gets, the harder it is to maintain a masculine appearance. So when a magical being appears one night promising to grant any wish in return for a favor, Kira asks to be given a male voice. Now with a stronger disguise, she accepts a job as a page to a nobleman – and not just any nobleman, but the grand duke! However, the job isn’t nearly as simple as she thought, and Kira will have to work hard and face many challenges ahead if she wants to succeed.

(Source: Tappytoon)

The Tiger Lord of the East is now my father?!

When Ari opens her eyes, she finds herself reborn as a baby in the land of divine animals, abandoned in the middle of a forest. Luckily, the white tiger lord takes her in, but he plans to send her away once she is old enough. Can Ari find a way to stay at the palace for as long as possible?

(Source: Manta)

In an attempt to overthrow her tyrannical brother and father, Princess Erinyes Taltal colluded with House Lowenthal... only to have the plot end with the family's death. Her last hope is Tristan Lowenthal, who managed to survive by becoming her slave. But her plans to have him become the leader of the revolt go awry when she discovers Tristan has no interest in reclaiming his family's title or fortune. With such dismal prospects, will Erinyes be able to emerge as the victor in this battle?

(Source: Tapas)

Everyone has at least one dirty little secret. As a result of a game started by her father, Ellie grew up unable to speak or write very well. Knowing her condition, three men disclose their deepest secrets to her. However, just as they begin taking an interest in her, Ellie disappears. She's eventually found, but this time, she can speak! (Source: Manta) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

The No.1 Hitman, Kim Gun, finds himself plunged into the world of martial arts due to a mysterious accident. To return to his original world, he must complete a mission called 'Martial Arts Conquest.' With a total of 2 guns, Kim Gun's adventure to subdue the unfamiliar martial arts world begins.(Source: Naver, translated)

"Is this really Joseon?! Even so, we must save lives!" Baek Gang-Hyeok, South Korea's greatest genius surgeon. After touching a mysterious painting, he falls into Joseon. And of all times... right before the outbreak of the Imjin War! (Source: Naver, translated) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

Commoner orphan Julia Arte is cursed with repeatedly dying and being reborn on the same snowy mountain trail. Now on her ninth life, she is determined to break the curse by getting revenge on her former lover Vasily Marjoram, who not only left her to die but sent assassins to kill her. After becoming the second lady-in-waiting to House Marjoram's sworn enemy, Prince Lewisia Ortega, Julia pulls out all the stops to take down Vasily. But will her scheming bring more trouble than she bargained for?(Source: Tapas)

Everyone loves Mr. Perfect, team leader Ji Do-Hoon-- except for one person, that is. For the past two years, Da-Jung has only had eyes for her coworker, Hyun-Woo. On the night of the company dinner, Da-Jung runs after him as he leaves and asks him to be her boyfriend. However, once the tall figure she confesses to steps out of the shadows, Da-Jung realizes she was talking to none other than Mr. Perfect himself! But what’s more shocking is… he agrees to date her! What in the world is he thinking?!(Source: Tapas)

title_en: How to Raise a Nine-Tailed Fox
description:
As captain of the holy knights, Celia excels at protecting the country from monsters. So, when a priestess tasks her with raising a baby nine-tailed fox, Celia is hesitant but does her best to help the creature. Despite the abuse he has endured from other humans, she manages to gain some of his trust and names him Rahn. They start getting along, but the crafty fox is always looking for a way to escape. Can Celia raise Rahn until he's an adult, or will this sly fox pull one over his holy knight?

(Source: Tapas)
This story tells you the value and importance of family; it will also remind you of the happiness and sadness, joys and sorrows of childhood. (Source: WEBTOONS)

title_en: The Vampire's Plans to Die in Peace
description:
After a failed attempt at ending her own life, our female lead is reborn in the body of a blood-sucking Vampire who is unable to die. To her dismay, she discovers that she is Luna, the Final Boss of the Novel, "The Hunter and the Saintess,", which she read before jumping to her death.

She realizes that her once chance at a clean death is the prolonged and painful end, destined for her at the hands of the novel's protagonists.

"Please, can't i just die in Peace?!!!"

With centuries to go until the protagonists are even born, Luna launches a multi-generational master plan to change the course of the original story. If the protagonists are provided will all the tools and benefits they need, they could destroy her with ease, allowing her to end things in peace.

For centuries, Luna executes this master plan, only to have her own involvement interrupt her desired outcomes at each turn. With powerful abilities and the influence of noble houses at her fingertips, will Luna's plans to find and raise her fated killers succeed? Will she get the peaceful death she desires?

(Source: Pocket Comics, edited)

Adele, a girl born in an orphanage and raised by her uncle, finds an egg in the forest. Little did she know, she has adopted herself a .charming dragon prince! After nine years of living under her wicked aunt and cousins who forced her into doing all the house chores, Adele's lifes turns upside down through the little boy that hatches out of a giant egg. Adele names the boy Zigmunt and takes care of him with love and care. Meanwhile, the Grand Duke Hernes and the Grand Wizard Jensen are in a desperate search for the lost dragon egg, from which the new emperor of the Bysen Empire. Adele's life turns upside down as she enters the Royal Palace with Zigmunt. That is only the beginning of this very special love story, one between the blood-thirsty dragon prince Zigmunt and his Adele.

(Source: POCKET COMICS)

They call her Saintess, a mystical and beautiful holy figure that guides the nation. Suddenly one day, her body has switched with a flippant, crude womanizer! To conceal the emergency, she's sent to hide at a college as a normal student. But how is that possible with a scheme to get rid of her and all these hearts aflutter at school?!

(Source: Tappytoon)

You can have everything else, but not him!

When Anita's long-lost older sister Arabella finally turns up after 19 years, their parents are overjoyed and begin to shower her with the love and attention Anita never received. But when they try to take away her best friend and fiancé, Axion, Anita finally puts her foot down. She's had enough.

(Source: Manta)

Yana Jeong, a typical girl, runs into a strange man who’s out of breath during one of her part-time jobs. Little did she know that this was Kai Shim, the son of the CEO of a large jewelry corporation called Inoroo, who also happens to be a merman. Yana coincidentally runs in Kai again when she ends up working as a waitress at his birthday party, where a series of accidents lead to the two of them meeting each other again. Will Yana be able to keep up with these unexpected events happening one after another?(Source: WEBTOON)

Kim Yoo-Young is sick of playing the nice, boring lawyer and daughter. So when her overbearing mother books her a hotel room the night before an arranged blind date, she steps out of character and spends the night with a seductive stranger from the hotel bar. Only this stranger turns out to be none other than Cha Ji-Hoon, her blind date and the hotel's high-class owner! Yoo-Young will do anything to keep their "bad deed" a secret... but can she really marry her first one-night stand? (Source: Tapas) Note: Includes a prologue and five side story chapters.

As a fan of idol Ryu Seon-Jae, Im Sol was happy fangirling to her heart’s content. That is until one day, Seon-Jae is suddenly found dead. As she grieves, Sol discovers a curious pocket watch that takes her six years into the past. Before she knows it, Sol tracks down a teenage Seon-Jae, and the words “I freaking love you!” spill out. Now, he’s totally creeped out by her, but Sol must somehow win over Seon-Jae to stop history from repeating. With the clock ticking, can she save her future number one? (Source: Tapas, edited)

Lysian de Neif thought her sad life couldn't get any worse until she discovered she was kidnapped by the woman she called mother and never returned because her real family refused to save her. After learning the secret behind her birth, Lysian dies yet again, only to wake up in the past as her younger self. This time, she decides to go on a journey to find the ones who abandoned her and get revenge. But little does Lysian know that there is more to the truth and her kin than meets the eye…

(Source: Tapas)
The man-eating monster 'Infectee'. I became a monster. (Source: Naver, translated) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

A powerful grand wizard named, “Raim” reappears after a millennium because of a failed experiment. While sets out to regain his lost tower, he meets “are” and “ere” who have been trafficked as slaves... a combination of a weird grand magician who only uses his wits to make money and the cute, lovable brother and sister of the Miao​ tribe! Their endless adventure is beginning to unfold.

Gyeoul, a friend from the same class, always maintains proper posture. For some reason, Gyeoul keeps catching Yohan's attention. Suddenly, the two of them become deskmates. Just like the physical distance, their hearts get closer. This loud heartbeat. What should we call the rising blush of that face? A clueless boy and girl's first love story.(Source: Naver, translated)

This is the legendary tale of valiant princes, devoting their lives to rescue the princess from the evil drake that has been terrorizing the nation… "Here I am, my damsel in distress, I will smite the dragon and return you back to the golden castle!" when the brave prince roars his promise, our beautiful princess Mikaella asks the question to drake. "Xeno, I don't want to be saved by him... Please take care of him." The mighty "evil" dragon responds,"Anything for my sweet Mikaella." (Source: Pocket Comics)
Märchen, saved from the brink of death avoids all training from his teacher. However, she comes up with another plan to make him stronger through making him read old tales.

Legend says that a being stronger than any other, a being feared by both angels and demons, a being completely OVER THE TOP (aka OTT) will be awakened in the near future. But our average high school boy Jae-Ik doesn’t care much for this legend... until he turns 19 and members of Heaven and Hell desperately attempt to win him over. Will our soon-to-be fearsome (and uninterested) OTT be able to pick a side? Well, we'll see once the dust of the recruiting war settles.(Source: WEBTOON) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

Young Ma Go-Eun and her father are about to be evicted from the haunted house they've run throughout the years. But Go-Eun is not about to let the park owner demolish their haunted house and her memories of her childhood and her mother. She resolves to go to the United States to surpass trials and get a million dollar cash prize awarded to those who can survive a stay in Ghost Jack's House.

When Karina wakes up inside a novel, she realizes she’s been given a chance to change the tragic lives of the male lead, Roland Bleuet, and his sister, Melisa. Karina saves up as much money as she can and makes a run for it with the children. But to her dismay, the money she has saved up isn’t enough to get the three of them to the capital. Instead, they head for Torres where Karina bumps into Duke Claude Torres, a “talent fanatic” who is obsessed with collecting talented individuals and an antagonist who will negatively impact Roland’s life in the future. Will Karina be able to protect Roland and Melisa from all dangers and give her adoptive children a better future?

(Source: Tappytoon)

Princess Apollonia may seem weak and dim-witted, but the truth is, she’s not as clueless as she seems. She must keep up her act of ignorance to foil her cruel father’s political schemes and weave her way out of his arranged marriages. Her ultimate objective is to avenge the deaths of her mother and grandfather and shape her own destiny! With a few secret powers, a handful of trustworthy allies, and some schemes of her own... will Princess Apollonia successfully reclaim her throne as the rightful heir?(Source: Tapas)

Lee Lina, resident of the dystopian world Tolka, plays the VR dating sim Raison D’Etre with the pain setting at zero. After her 99th playthrough, she is gifted a new patch for completing all the endings. However, as she begins her 100th game, and her favorite characters start acting oddly affectionate to her in an unfamiliar storyline, Lina wonders if the reward is more of a glitch. Will Lina be able to unlock a new ending before shocking news back in Tolka makes it impossible to ignore reality?

(Source: Tapas)

With the appearance of the Overlord’s Star in the sky, the world plunges into chaos, and only the one born with the essence of the star can save it. Amidst the upheaval, former comrades Baek Woonhoi and Chun Ryuyoung each dream of becoming the Overlord. Ryuyoung to save his family, and Woonhoi because he has nothing else to lose. But as the star shines brighter, the two find themselves swept up in an impending war. Both men’s ambitions burn fiercely, but only one Overlord can reign supreme!
(Source: Tapas)

Eun Lee has had an eventful day. First, she won the lottery. Then, she was summoned to a mystical realm by the Demon King, Kaon Mahana Lord Moon Blood Rain, and was newly named Rue, princess of the demon realm. Eun demands to be returned to her original world so she can collect her winnings, but Kaon wonders if she has something to do with his late lover’s will. Eun surprises herself by adjusting to her new and unfamiliar life, but will she ever truly let go of her past and find happiness here?

(Source: Tapas)

Minjun wished for the world to end-- until it did. When a zombie appears at his door, the bullied teen chooses to fight for survival. Teaming up with Yena, his sassy yet charming classmate, he flees the collapsing city. Hunted by the infected and haunted by enemies old and new, they discover that in a world without rules, trust may be their only chance at survival.(Source: WEBTOON)

Sick and tired of her mother's ruinous debts, Richelle accepts a post as tutor to the illustrious Otis family. But upon finding a letter with strict, eerie rules on how to survive within the manor of roses, Richelle senses that something sinister is lurking. Now, she must pay the price for her choice.(Source: Manta)

The bond of family can be a star that guides us in the night, or a chain that drags us down. For aspiring hunter Seung-Hyeon Gi, both are true. He dreams of becoming a legendary hunter like his father, despite his bitterness at his family’s preoccupation with his comatose sister, So-Hyeon. Everything changes when So-Hyeon suddenly regains consciousness and reveals herself as a ‘Homecomer’, possessing powerful abilities from transmigrating to another world while comatose. Seung-Hyeon realizes that if he wants to protect his sister, he'll need to grow stronger, and there’s no better place than the Seong-Han Academy for the Gifted…(Source: WEBTOON)

As a fellow aspiring saint with healing powers, Belze spent her whole childhood being compared to the ever-so-perfect Diana. So when offered the chance to expose her rival's family for treason, she doesn't think twice... But it all turns out to be a trap that only gets herself and her benevolent sponsor framed and executed! Luckily, she's given a second shot: She wakes up at the age of 5 again, determined to repay her benefactors this time. But turning a new leaf is easier said than done...

(Source: Tapas)

The three kingdoms, the era where heroes flocked in order to defeat the world. The best-armed follicles got lost in history due to a momentary mistake. The last moments of life… “Give me one more chance, I promise I’ll defeat the world!” When I opened my eyes, the follicle was in its twenties. It went back in time, with its tumultuous spirit beginning to unfold! (Source: Kakao, translated)

After the last episode "Servant Yesterday, Crown Princess Today," the author thought she was done with the story. But when she awakens as the villainess, Evangeline, she realizes the ending was just the beginning! To avoid the gruesome end she originally wrote for Evangeline, she resolves to win the male lead's favor and be accepted into his household. But as the plot begins to take strange turns that make Evangeline the new heroine, it becomes clear this story was written by someone else...

(Source: Tapas)

title_en: The Grand Duke of the North
description:
Yumi, an actress with no experience in love, is terrified when she wakes up in a dark romance as Selene Belias on her wedding night! Yet instead of confining her like in the novel, her husband, "Monster Archduke" Varas, brings her gifts and takes her on outings. She falls for him... but then discovers he thinks she's a witch and is searching for the real Selene! Can this actress convince her first love that she's really his wife? Or is she to be cast out of this role that's not rightfully hers?
(Source: Tapas)

In the midst of the devastation, only the soldiers’ bones remained.
It’s only a matter of time before the entire world is annihilated. To avoid this, Kyung-Hoon began searching for clues in another universe with the help of a ten-year-old phone he discovered in an abandoned building.

Stuck in the body of a rich and spoiled side character in a romance novel, Aris Horrison is determined not to experience the destitute fortune of her namesake. After deciding to take the plot—and the plotting—into her own hands, Aris starts to romantically pursue the novel’s hero. However, her preemptive strike only pushes the other characters to deviate from the original plot, ultimately sending her little rewrite spinning rapidly out of control. Aris soon begins to wonder if having spoilers about her life is really all it’s cracked up to be… 
(Source: Tapas)

He’s broke, lonely, and he’s a loser. With the betrayal by the only friend that he once thought he had, Ui-Jin’s casual investment in cryptocurrency miraculously bears fruit, turning him into a millionaire in an instant. Thanks to the unexpected fortune, Ui-Jin’s life somehow drastically changes for the better… or does it?
(Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title_en: I Became the Duke’s Male Servant
description:
In the original story, Roselia was a maid in the duke’s household, used as a mere pawn in his schemes before being executed by the crown prince after being framed as a traitor. But this Roselia is different. The heroine, now in the body of the doomed maid from the novel and fully aware of how the story ends, is determined to change Roselia’s fate—disguising herself as a man to avoid the duke’s attention. But wait… why is she still being taken?! Somehow, Roselia still ends up in the duke’s estate—not as a maid, but as a manservant!

(Source: WEBTOONS)

“I shall destroy the factions of justice and avenge the deaths of my comrades!” Jeonghwa, the captain of the Black Serpent Squad, loses everyone she grew up with when the lawful factions betray them after the battle against the chaotic factions. On the verge of death herself, she must now claw her way up to deliver true justice to the so-called justice factions.

(Source: WEBTOON)

To Yoonha, a model student at an elite high school, romance has always felt like a frivolous distraction. But when four surprising choices for love appear, her pencil begins to waver. Will she choose the right answer and ace the ultimate test?
(Source: WEBTOON)

title_en: Raising the Children of the Main Characters
description:
After watching his first love marry his best friend, Eins Lainswaine resigns himself to life with another violet-eyed woman. Ye-Hi Lee never expected to be part of his story, until she is reincarnated as Eins’ reluctant wife, Märchen Lainswaine. On the bright side, twins Lieph and Joseph remind Ye-Hi Lee of her deceased siblings at every turn. Could the Lainswaines overcome a lifetime of tragic accidents (and mysterious circumstances) to become adoptive parents…and maybe even something more?

(Source: Tapas, edited)

Yoo-An Ha, a high school senior, messed up his SATs because he mismarked his papers. He is approached by a foreigner- no, a demon who proposes to turn back time. In exchange, Yoo-An must stand in as the demon king's replacement... Will Yoo-An, living the demon king's life, be able to safely return to his own life? “Should I live however I want? I'm the real king until the real one returns!”

(Source: Copin Comics)

title_en: The Flower That Swallowed the Beast
description:
A bargain for her life, to escape a tragic future. When Iris Whittle is murdered by her sadistic husband, she is sent back in time to when she was 20 years old. As the unwanted daughter of a duke, Iris realizes she can leverage her status and foresight to secure a better life this time around. Thus, Iris makes a daring marriage proposal to the fearsome Count Keibrandt Green, the most eligible bachelor of Gavizar Empire, whose gruff and stern demeanor hides the fangs of a wolf.
(Source: WEBTOON)

Hyun-Su Jung (29) was scammed by Jung-Mi Kim and is now in debt of 900,000$. He is being chased by loan sharks and ended up kidnapping Jung-Mi Kim's daughter, Ha-Yeon Lee (17). But when Hyun-Su Jung calls to ask for a ransom, Jung-Mi Kim tells him she doesn't care about what happens to her daughter and hangs up. What will happen to the kidnapper and his victim?

When Yunseol wakes up as Laila el Este in the novel, “Bird Cage,” she is horrified. Though Laila may be beautiful, her beauty is the reason the three male leads obsess over her and make her life a living hell. As such, Laila decides to use her professional makeup skills to become high society’s infamous ugly duckling. But out of nowhere, she receives a marriage proposal from Duke Montefeltra, a fellow outcast who is ostracized for his unattractive looks. Will this turn of events help Laila escape the novel’s bad ending once and for all?

(Source: Tappytoon)

"Face your destiny." In the alternate realm of the Otherworld—filled with creatures and Earth's catastrophes—an ancient warrior, a human summoned long ago into the realm, is determined to bring it all to an end. Fueled by the resentment of an unknown past, this journey unravels hidden identities, embarks on undercover missions, faces death trials, navigates through betrayals, and wades through bloodbaths. What do the shadows conceal, and what destiny awaits in the heart of the unknown?(Source: WEBTOON)

Princess Daphne helped her brother, the male lead, become the crown prince to ensure her own happy ending. However, her dream is shattered when she is killed by that very brother! In the next moment, Daphne somehow wakes up as her 13-year-old self again. Vowing to destroy the one who wronged her, she decides to become a patron for Archduke Bertrund, the story's archvillain, and have him carry out her revenge. But will Daphne be able to get the ending she wants with a villain's assistance?

(Source: Tapas)

As if being framed by her love for plotting a murder weren’t enough, Rinette learns that her stepsister, Kanna, is the true mastermind behind it all. As she’s burned at the stake, Rinette makes a desperate wish for another chance…and wakes up as her younger self. Determined to change her fate, she vows to stop Kanna’s schemes and protect her family this time around. But rewriting the past is far from simple. Each choice she makes brings unforeseen consequences—some more devastating than she could imagine. Can Rinette escape the shadows of her past, or will they consume her once more?(Source: WEBTOON)

title_en: Don't Give the Book Your Heart
description: Ashilee Kaltanias is reborn as a side character in a novel. As an abandoned princess, she lives in secluded luxury until she discovers a book that predicts her death. Trying to find the key to survival, she ventures out of her palace only to attract the attention of Castor, the bloodthirsty crown prince. When Castor murders her as prophesied, Ashilee finds herself in an endless time loop that restarts when Castor kills her. How many more times must she die before she finds a way to live?(Source: Tapas)

When veterinarian Yoohee Han dies early, a grim reaper sends her into the world of a novel she once read to live out the rest of her time as the side character Alexa. She uses her knowledge of the novel (and of animals) to take on a more prominent role as the trainer of Isildus, heir of Terrecion, a wolf shifter who will remain in animal form until his 16th birthday. She becomes a beloved advisor in Terrecion castle, and her actions change the fates of other characters. How will little Issy feel about her when he becomes human?

(Source: Tapas)

Long straight hair, a white dress, his first love—these three words linger faintly in Baek-gu's mind as he promptly passes out. When a mysterious woman appears at his doorstep amidst a pouring rainstorm, Baek-gu is shocked to his core. Not because she faintly reminds him of someone he knew long, long ago, but because he mistakes her for a ghost. With their relationship already starting off on an awkward foot, the question looms: what will become of the story between these two?(Source: Lezhin US)

For the past 300 years, Ente has fought against the dragon, Caliesto, as the reigning Magnus. When she finally slays her nemesis, she welcomes death with open arms, hoping to meet her beloved teacher in the afterlife. But instead of finally gaining the eternal rest she has long yearned for, she opens her eyes in the body of Melissa Tiony, the richest bachelorette in the empire. Ente realizes that her lifelong mission has yet to be fulfilled, as it is impossible for her to die so long as Caliesto still breathes. She must find a way to regain her magic and finish him once and for all, and the first step to doing so is attending the Academy of Magic in the city of Kastium. Ente sets out on another journey, hoping that this one will be her last.

(Source: Tappytoon)

God gave me a chance to relive my life. Before the rebirth, I had been used for the past 400 years as the empire's sword. And so, I swore to destroy the empire. I found the young prince of the country and became his teacher. I taught him how to become a tyrant and asked for the country. 

"I will do the lady's will."

He conquered the whole empire for me, and I ran away.

"I came to take you, Charlize Ronan." Dylan became a perfect tyrant and searched the entire empire for me.

"You tamed me, so why did you run away?"

Aurora Fenryr Astrophotas, the Goddess of War, returns from the seven-year war to face the aftermath of her father’s mysterious illness and subsequent death as well as the four men vying for her hand in marriage. Her best friend’s lover, her loyal fan’s fiancé, a professor with a secret, and her ex-fiancé come before her, but will she find a husband in time? She yearns to return to the battlefield, but instead, she must evade bedchamber intruders, power-hungry nobles, the haunting illness, and most importantly… her own heart. (Source: Tapas) Note: Chapter count includes the prologue.

Republic of Korea Special Forces, Kang Yi-Chan. During the mission, he faced enemies to save his comrades and was isolated alone in the operational area of the mission. It had been several days since he had faced the enemy without being able to sleep and waiting for rescue to come for him… but in the end, he saw the bazooka flying over the hill, he realized that it was the end of his life and then fainted… When he regained consciousness and opened his eyes, he found himself in a trance, alone in a strange world.(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

Suit up! Jian is an Italian soccer league benchwarmer who needs to convince his childhood friend that he's a star player. A lucky goal or two might do the trick, but how long can he keep up the ruse? Unless, unbeknownst to him, Jian really is a genius...(Source: WEBTOON)

I sacrificed my precious vacation to attend a pop-up event of a certain modern fantasy I loved so much. And on that very day, I got transported into that fantasy world. As none other than a newly hired employee at a renowned major corporation! A dream workplace with tons of benefits, a high salary, and kind, competent supervisors. Using my knowledge of the world, I quickly climb the corporate ladder!

But am I happy, you ask? Please, let me go back home.

(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

By the time Princess Ophelia Lidania's fourth death rolls around, she's gotten pretty sick of dying painfully. However, she seems unable to avoid her fate of being killed by her half-brother Ewout Lidania. She's tried being nice to him, locking him up, and having him killed, but it always ends the same way. So, her goal for her fifth life is to just die painlessly. To this end, she hires the elite assassin Nau to stay by her side. But will this be enough to overturn her fate and bring her peace? (Source: Tapas) Note: Includes four extra chapters.

title_en: Regressed, but the World Didn’t End
description: Humanity’s last hope just got a second chance… and a mountain of debt. Dohyeok, the champion of humankind, is sent back in time to stop the apocalypse. He then pours his time, money, and soul into preparing for an alien invasion that never comes. Now chased by creditors instead of aliens, Dohyeok turns to game streaming to repay his debt. Follow the ex-hero-turned-streamer as he hacks his way through popular game titles one epic stream at a time. (Source: WEBTOON)

The protagonist, who had worked himself to the bone at the Murim Alliance, finally retires and heads back to his hometown to fulfill his dream of becoming a sect leader. Due to his meager savings, he ends up purchasing a manor that was suspiciously cheap, and rumored to be haunted. But then, an unfamiliar system suddenly appears before him. Though startled at first, the protagonist soon begins to use the system to efficiently recruit disciples and manage the sect’s finances and resources. In time, with the help of the system, his sect grows rapidly, so much that it starts drawing the attention, wariness, and hostility of other Murim factions…(Source: Naver, translated)

Cheoldu, a barbarian raised on Earth, lives a mundane life with his best friend Jintae. But when he sees an alien creature from his planet on the news, everything changes. Thrown into an apocalyptic challenge, Cheoldu and Jintae must adjust their lives in Nova, a savage world filled with goblins and ogres. Will the two conquer Nova’s perils and uncover the secrets that could change Earth’s fate? An epic tale of friendship, survival, and untamed adventure awaits.(Source: WEBTOON)

Did our runt Vanessa Blake encounter another god because yours abandoned you? May we, the lord of evil Belzebuth, tell you something interesting? Most humans seek your god when they end up meeting us. They seem to think their lord will save them and seeing their desperation never fails to make us laugh. That is because their god is just our other half. You may see your many reincarnations as a sign of your god’s disdain, but we feel you are beloved. Thus, we shall give you whatever you desire.(Source: Tapas)

title_en: I Was the Real Head of the House
description:
Born powerless in a family of water awakeners, Riarte Elheim was sacrificed for her twin brother and met an untimely death. Reborn three years before her tragic end, she vows to abandon the family that betrayed her. With Mikhail Virche, the cunning heir of the Virche family, by her side, Riarte begins a new life—but will her second chance lead to freedom or ruin?

(Source: Tapas)

Despite being a beauty from a famous family, Roselia Kaneph is quite literally the poorest noble in the empire. Sick of munching on carrots during teatime and not being able to add salt to her meals, Roselia comes up with a plan to go from rags to riches: marry the emotionless Crown Prince Anoch! But before she can even go through with this, she stumbles upon Anoch, who mistakes her for a thief and an assassin. Will Roselia be able to convince him otherwise and persuade him to marry her?

(Source: Tapas)

After ten years of pretending to be the count’s hated daughter, Karuna is ready to escape. However, her plan goes sideways when she gets attacked. In order to save herself, she takes a potion that promises to turn back time. Instead, it transforms Karuna into a child. Things get even weirder when she witnesses a giant wolf transform into Duke Vykeld, and now she must hide out in his isolated manor. After terrorizing nobles for ten years, can Karuna handle being a child again?
 
(Source: Tapas)

Spirits roam the land in the mountainous country of Donghye. Some live peacefully alongside human beings, whereas others prey on the innocent. Solitary swordsman Sehui Han travels the land hunting down spirits and ghosts that plague the lives of ordinary folk. He is aided by a powerful spirit called Black Tiger, who grants Sehui strength in return for being allowed to feed on the spirits they meet. 

One day, Sehui encounters a young spirit called the Hwimori. Though she appears to be an innocent child, government soldiers are on her trail, determined to track her down. Empathizing with her plight, Sehui embarks upon a journey to restore her name and memories… but what will they find at the end of their road?

(Source: WEBTOONS)

A fateful encounter between a girl and a... cat? Moments after trying to save a cat from an oncoming truck, Ha-Ji Kang finds herself transported to Cat Kingdom. There, she encounters Gyeol-Han Ko, a cold and unforgiving prince, and is immediately thrown into a cell. What is this strange land, and will Haji be able to return home?(Source: Manta) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

Are first loves overrated, or can a reunion as adults bring back emotions of the past? Yun-Ji and Sae-Bom share a first love story left unfinished, abruptly interrupted by ten years of being apart. Now, as adults, both seem to have moved on from that unfinished chapter of their lives and agree to remain friends and coworkers. However, the surface is not everything there is to be seen, as an unspoken tension lingers between them. Will they merely stay friends, or does destiny have other plans for them?

(Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title_en: 100-man Undong YouTuber-in Naega I Webtoon-eseoneun Choneungnyeokdo Eomneun Jjeori? -Buje: Wollae Geuraesseum-
description: Take a look at this—!! [Saving the World at the Gym!] The year is 20XX. With the invasion of monsters straight out of a B-movie, humanity opens its eyes to a new power! Among the heroes who ooze strength and power without having to work out is a "tiger" who guards the Stronger Gym... No, it’s not a tiger, it’s a man wearing a tiger-patterned t-shirt and pants! Today, he greets his gym babies with joy like any other day. "What? A gym baby?! Don't be scared. Come on in!" Come watch the main character and his Stronger Gym friends cultivate a healthy mind and a healthy body!(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

Hae-Ri Jin is an aspiring actress who hasn't had the best of luck. But this time, she has a good feeling about the show she's about to audition for. Since it's a period piece, she decides to stop by a historical museum and comes across a beautiful incense burner from the Baekje era. Mesmerized, she prays for good luck, but little does she know that she has awoken a god named Onsaemiro who was trapped in the incense burner. How was she able to free him? Because she is the reincarnation of a princess of Baekje who was once Onsaemiro's lover...! (Source: WEBTOON, edited) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

After her house falls to ruin, Abigail Dilloa is relegated to serving an imprisoned princess for the rest of her life. Just as she finally comes to terms with her fate, assassins murder the sweet princess in cold blood. Faced with the same grisly fate, Abigail's past regrets flash before her eyes, but she is saved at the last minute by Duke Lakiel de Edelgard. However, the cunning duke is hell-bent on revenge, and he gives her an ultimatum: die, or play the part of Princess Violeta in his sinister succession scheme. Now that she has become a puppet in this play, will Abigail manage to fool the world and steal the throne? Or, will the cruel politics of the palace expose her act as nothing but a sham? Based on the hit novel.

(Source: Tappytoon)

Don’t judge a book by its cover! Eugene is a powerful mage whose appearance can frighten anyone out of their wits, but all this kind-hearted soul wants to do is teach Ain, the daughter of his master, so she can become the next archmage. Can his curriculum help her navigate through the world of magic and become the second-greatest mage of all time?
(Source: WEBTOON)

When the youngest sister of the Yu family ends her own life, her elder brother begins to investigate her untimely death. The only clue left behind is the record of her messages on Savior -- a mysterious online community for those who need salvation from reality.

(Source: WEBTOON)

title_en: I Raided the Demon God's Treasure Trove
description: The peace of the world collapses after a war between the gods and demons, leading to the downfall of humanity—except for one person. Sewoon, the sole survivor, is determined to rewrite the ending of this tragic tale. While searching for Kronos' hourglass to reverse time, he discovers the treasure trove of the Demon of Greed, filled with items that can aid him in achieving his goal. With these demonic treasures at his disposal, can Sewoon stop the war and secure lasting peace in the world?(Source: Tapas)

How far are you willing to go for love?

Not a day goes by that Eve doesn't wish to reunite with her childhood friend, Mikha. But three years later, when she learns that Mikha has become a cursed sorcerer who leaves only death in his wake, Eve must embark on a journey to save not only the man she loves but also the world as she knows it.

(Source: Manta)

Jaerim, a.k.a. the “Executioner”, the most fearsome villain of all, is about to marry his civilian girlfriend! But before they can say “I do”, he has to survive life with her family, who just so happen to be the most powerful superhero clan. Can he keep his identity a secret and convince them that he’s the perfect son-in-law?(Source: WEBTOON)

An unknown actress's life is ruined when she wakes up as Cha Yeryeon, the villainess of a daytime drama. Determined to avoid an antagonist's fate, Yeryeon works to nudge the story toward a different ending. But as her actions threaten to upend the lives of other characters, Yeryeon has to figure out how to get her satisfying story while also protecting the people she cares for. Will Yeryeon flip the script and change the drama for the better? Or will she be stuck playing the bad guy forever?(Source: Tapas)

After being killed by the obsessive male lead Killian, Ines finds herself back in the real world as Sum. Determined to live differently this time, Sum resolves to finally claim a happy ending. But to her shock, she meets Haewon Lee, a school celebrity who looks exactly like Killian. As Sum grows confused by Haewon’s kindness-- so unlike the arrogant and violent Killian she once knew-- Haewon hides his true intentions, carefully shaping himself into someone Sum would love. What awaits them in the future?(Source: WEBTOON)

What would you do when you've transmigrated as the most-hated villainess in the story? In the case of Marso, she tried hard to change the storyline by performing good deeds and taking care of the female lead. However, things are not going as she had hoped for—every character in the story still hates her! It seems no matter what she does she cannot seem to change her fate. Tired of trying, Marso declares that she'll stay home and do nothing—for the rest of her life.

(Source: Pocket Comics)

Humanity's greatest gym rat Hansol, lost consciousness during a deadlift. When he opened his eyes, he arrived at a different world. Monsters appeared in front of him, and all that he could see was protein...? "I'll flip this world by working out!"(Source: Naver, translated)

Gang-ho is a laborer at the local factory, sleeping just 3 hours a day and working like a horse. But when his face is burned in an accident at work, he's left unemployed. Scared of his daughter's reaction to his burns, Gang-ho decides to transform into the superhero, Gugu-Man!
(Source: WEBTOONS)

Beware the witch in the forest for she may curse you with her stench! So everyone says about Lyla, who was abandoned by her family and cast away to a cabin deep in the woods for being born with a putrid odor. Though she’s spent her entire life alone, everything changes the night Viorst comes knocking at her door. When asked why he isn’t disgusted by her, he claims it’s because he lacks the ability to smell. Little does Lyla know that her new visitor is actually a hungry beast that was lured in by her absolutely irresistible scent...

(Source: Tappytoon)

title_en: Will You Be My Male Lead?
description: Ah-Rah Shin was secretly in love with Seung-Woo Han, her childhood friend. Unable to express her feelings, she wrote a novel, molded the male lead after him, and confessed her love in the pages. He never read it, but everyone else did, and her first novel was a hit! Now a famous web novelist, Ah-Rah struggles to write her second book without a muse until she meets Joo-Won Cha. Joo-Won is the ideal male lead. He's handsome, professional, and very different from her first male lead! There's only one issue... he's the CEO of her publishing company!(Source: Tapas)

High priest Sia awaits her peaceful death after leading a life devoted to helping other people. Instead of finding herself next to Lord Pleon the God, she finds herself in the body of Elena, a woman known to be wicked. While adjusting to her new body and new life as a universally hated figure, Sia continues to encounter men she had acquainted during her day as a high priest. What's even more surprising is that those men seem to get increasingly obsessed with her. "I am no longer the high priest on whom everyone depended, so why are these men still getting obsessed with me?!" (Source: Pocket Comics)

When Coco dies after five happy years with her owner Chloe, she thinks her tail-wagging days are over. But Coco can't bear to stay in the afterlife as she watches Chloe's world crumble. Taking pity on her, the Puppy God grants Coco's wish to return. Now, she's a human child who gets adopted into Chloe's family. Unfortunately, she discovers that reaching Chloe's heart is harder than any trick she's ever learned. Can she fetch the joy Chloe has lost, or has their bond slipped away like a leash?(Source: Tapas)

In a world where adventurers raid dungeons for fame and fortune, Nagi is stuck as a lowly porter – overlooked, mistreated, and considered expendable. But armed with a mysterious magic bag and quick wits, Nagi begins to challenge the brutal hierarchy from within. Can he rise above betrayal, dangerous monsters, and a corrupt system – or will this ruthless world discard him like the baggage he carries?(Source: WEBTOON)

title_en: This is a Campus Romance Series
description: My name is Ha-Yun Lee, and I'm an ordinary college student. I decided to go on a spontaneous trip before school resumed and met this guy named Kang-On. He asked me out on the first day we met, but of course, I rejected him. I thought I'd never see him again, but guess what? I ran into him during the school club recruitment event! And wait… What? Even Ji-Il, the president of the student club "You," also has a crush on me?! I swear I'm not delulu. I swear! (Source: WEBTOONS) Note: Includes four side story chapters.

title_en: The Spy Life in the Demonic Sect
description: Iseo Jang, the Murim Alliance’s prodigy spy, has spent 14 years deep undercover in the Demon Sect, earning the ruthless title of “Rabid Dog” for his work as their counterintelligence agent. But his newest mission is his most absurd yet: make the Sect’s laziest, most notorious delinquent -- Wu Ma -- the next Cheonma. To pull it off, Iseo ditches his post and applies to be Wu Ma’s official aide. In a world of betrayal, martial arts, and political games, can even a talent like Iseo turn a hopeless young master into an heir?(Source: WEBTOON)

The greatest martial artist on the continent and the supreme Martial Emperor who unified the martial world—Suhyeok. He had achieved everything, yet a lingering emptiness in his heart remained unfulfilled by his yearning for family... In the end, he crossed dimensions using the power of sorcery, but what lay before his eyes was... "I was in a coma for five years in a hospital!? And what's with this system window floating in front of me!? Black Sage, you big-mouthed bastard! You said you'd send me back to my world! Why the hell is everything so messed up!?" During the five years he lay unconscious, his family had been struggling to pay his hospital bills... "For my family's sake, I need to make money—fast and a lot of it." The strongest Martial God of the Hwan Continent, Suhyeok! Now Awakened, he begins his journey to level up. (Source: KakaoPage, translated)
The more you think about it, the scarier it gets. This is about things that are everywhere and nowhere.(Source: WEBTOON)

What do you do if you're going on 18, totally awkward and lacking in self-confidence? You could just sit in your room all day and all night and study and wonder why you never get asked out…OR, if you’re Woo-Yeon Song you could join up with the Spirit Fingers – the strangest, hippest, coolest (yet most welcoming) art club ever. But as Woo-Yeon is about to learn, discovering your TRUE colors is about more than just painting.

(Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

Set against the backdrop of a wintry Seoul, Winter Breeze tells a story of second chances, hope, and the unexpected warmth that can bloom even in the coldest seasons. Two years after their fleeting encounter at Seoul Station, Hae-Na is reunited with Do-Hwa at a newly opened photo studio tucked away in her quiet neighborhood, and finds herself drawn to the mysterious photographer she hasn’t been able to forget. Is their reunion merely coincidence, or is it the beginning of something meant to be?(Source: WEBTOON)

While working late one night, Kang Hyuna died in a sudden explosion... or so she thought. She wakes up as Belita Olden, the villain in the game she developed, "The Guardian's Garden." Unfortunately for her, this character is destined to die at the end of each route for messing with the heroine, Margaret Averdeen. Determined not to die a second time, Belita decides to go against the game and help Margaret have a happy ending instead. Thus begins her journey for a second chance of her own making!

(Source: Tapas)

"I want to live a simple life." Do-Hui wants to live as she always has, and her co-worker Dong-I likes to be alone. They have no intention of dating anyone in their workplace... Or do they? We invite you to the intimacy of two people who keep encountering each other. (Source: WEBTOON, edited) Note: Includes two extra chapters.

title_en: My Lord was Already Into Me When I Noticed
description:
Ten-year-old Celine Mars dreams of becoming a great knight escort just like her father. She’s set to serve under Damien Willow, the heir of a powerful Duke. There’s only one problem—he’s a total weakling, or so she thinks. Celine vows to train the poor, defenseless Damien to stand up for himself, completely unaware of his real strength. Meanwhile, Damien instantly takes a liking to Celine, finding her cluelessness and pure intentions both amusing and endearing. When will Celine finally realize she’s got the wrong idea about Damien?

(Source: WEBTOONS)

title_en: I Have Never Abandoned the Tyrant
description:
I transmigrated…twice. As Rari, I doted on Thierry so that I wouldn’t die at his hands later. But I was murdered anyway and, seven years later, I woke up as Princess Alicia Ashtad. Thierry became a ruthless tyrant in that time and, when he shows up in Ashtad Kingdom, I agree to leave with him to protect it. Now in Thierry’s palace, I must conceal my past life and, worse, someone wants me dead…again! Thierry may be the least of my worries.

(Source: Tapas)

Hiding her identity as a Snow Maiden demon, Seol-Ha has carved out a life in disguise among humans. However, her life changes forever when she catches the interest of the Northern Prince, a man known for hunting down and killing demons, and agrees to become his bride. Will these two be able to overcome their differences and live happily ever after?

(Source: WEBTOON)

Lee Han-Ah used to be bullied in the 2nd grade for having a ''wide and flat'' butt by a boy in her primary school and has hated him ever since. Now, in high school she is the celebrated, legendary captain of Il-Hwa Girls High School and she is seeking out a pretty boy boyfriend. What happens when she meets the mellow and seemingly perfect Yoo-Min? (Source: Esthétique)

The god of the Jeongpa and the magic of the Sapa. Two legendary doctors are getting married? Father is the god, mother is the magic. An absolute master appears before Dan Ak-Seon, who inherited his parents' medical skills. That fateful meeting leads the young Dan Ak-Seon to the world of martial arts...(Source: Kakaopage, translated)

In a cynical world where love has lost its luster, 37-year-old Ha-Yeong Kim is merely a shell of her former self. But in a twist of fate, she’s catapulted back in time, inhabiting the body and vibrant spirit of her 17-year-old self, Seon Kim, and reliving an era of passionate love and limitless potential. Empowered by her knowledge of what’s to come, Seon embarks on a mission to reshape her friends’ destinies. Bouncing between past and present, orchestrating grand changes, Seon begins to discover that altering others’ lives might be the key to rediscovering love, purpose, and the courage to dream again.

(Source: WEBTOON)

title_en: The Librarian of St. Bright Tower
description:
Vahlen dreams of being a magician at St. Bright Tower—the greatest institute of magic in the Paula Empire. Too bad he's just a lowly librarian there... until one day when he stumbles upon a magical book that promises to bring him glory. Now he is caught in an endless cycle of horrific events, doomed to repeat the same days over and over unless he can manage to figure out how to save Princess Elyse and achieve his fated destiny. 

(Source: Tapas)

28-year-old Gyu-Ri Gam has never dated anyone before in her life. When she wakes up one morning after a night of heavy drinking, she suddenly recalls that someone at work asked her out but can’t remember who it was! Gyu-Ri narrows it down to three possibilities: Seung-Hu, her hot co-worker who is nice to her; Myeong-Seok, her talented but cranky boss who she’s sure hates her; and Leo, a popular actor who anybody would kill to date. At first, Gyu-Ri thinks the identity of her secret admirer is obvious... but is it?

(Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

Byeolha wakes up as Rose, the female lead of a novel who is doomed to be betrayed by her unfaithful husband, Eric. The nightmare deepens when she discovers that her best friend, who stole her husband in their past life, has also transmigrated and is now targeting her husband again. However, Rose refuses to be the victim this time. She’ll gladly let her friend have her worthless husband while she plans her escape to a peaceful life. But fate has other plans when she keeps crossing paths with Arteum, the powerful Grand Duke…(Source: Tappytoon)

A legendary martial artist, after countless reincarnations, awakens in the body of Jin-Ho Seok, the neglected bastard of a powerful merchant family. Once downtrodden and suicidal, Jin-Ho transforms into an unstoppable force, stunning his family with unmatched martial arts skill. As his reputation soars, Jin-Ho’s newfound strength sets him on a path to reshape his destiny and claim his place in a world that once cast him aside.(Source: Tapas)

Han Maru, an ordinary husband and father, dies tragically in an accident but is granted a second chance at life. With only vague memories of the past, he relives his high school days and rediscovers his passion for theater, a dream he once sacrificed. However, longing to find his wife and daughter again in this life, he fears choosing theater might steer him away from them. Juggling dreams and family, he navigates life's intricate choices, seeking fulfillment in this extraordinary second chance.(Source: Tapas)

As the ace heart surgeon of Seomoon Jaeil Hospital, Dr. Yoon Hae-Jun always puts her patients first. To give them even better care, she hopes to open a heart transplant center on the premises. But when one of her patients goes AWOL and saddles the hospital with his bills, the whole project is put in jeopardy. Her only hope? Become the fake girlfriend of the wealthy hospital chairman Seo Yi-Han! But as Dr. Yoon will soon learn, melting his frigid heart may be more difficult than operating on one!

(Source: Tapas)

Become a Chetamja! Turn your rage into a weapon that defends the kingdom! When young Gwiyeong loses his family in a brutal Jurchen raid, he swears to hunt down every last one of them. His skill in battle soon catches the attention of King Sejong, who offers him a chance to join Chetamja—an elite force of secret agents serving as the king’s eyes and ears in the north. Now, alongside his comrades, Gwiyeong must carry the flame of vengeance and forge it into a blade of duty that will defend the kingdom of Joseon from the shadows.

(Source: WEBTOONS)

title_en: All That We Hope to Be
description:
Sometimes we just can't get out of a ditch; yet we still hope.
(Source: WEBTOONS)

Life is all about taking the easy way for Seokwoo, who feels zero guilt over robbing thousands of players as "Luke" in the VR game, Argus. Just when he's leveled up to a master criminal, however, he gets caught and is sentenced to life in prison! Luckily, Luke discovers the will of the vanquished Night King in his cell, which lets him start the game over in exchange for getting revenge on the king's enemies. Though his level and stats have been reset, it's only a matter of time before Argus' infamous thief steals his way back to the top!(Source: Tappytoon)

Think you can make it to the end? Blood-thirsty spirits, vicious curses, and sickening twists haunt these individual horror stories from 29 different creators. Scroll if you dare. But whatever you do, don’t scroll alone! (Source: WEBTOON) Stories featured: 1) Neulpureun yoyangwon (늘푸른 요양원 - Evergreen Nursing Home) by Ryoung) 2) Gosulsa (고술사 - The Shaman) by Hwang Jun-Ho 3) Bidulgi (비둘기 - Pigeon) by Hoodbird 4) Jasing nongsa (자식 농사 - Raising a Success) by Mangsoon 5) Boinda(보인다 - I See You) by Kim Lee-Yeon 6) Junggogeorae (중고거래 - Buying Used)by Kingsnal/Jui-Joo 7) Geugeotdeul (그것들 - Them) by Cyclops/Kim Do-yeon 8) Uri gajok (우리 가족 - My Family) by Su Ri-bu 9) Gongpoui Saengdongseong (공포의 생동성 - The horror of Vitality) by Jin Ja/Jeong Saeng 10) Sungnyeokkeseoneun Bimireul Sireohasinda (숙녀께서는 비밀을 싫어하신다 - The Lady Hate Secrets) by Go Tae-ho 11) Angwi (안귀 - The Eye Phantom) by Aeon 12) Hum (훔 - Hum) by Lee Su-Min 13) Back Rooms no.0605 (Back Rooms no.0605 - Backrooms no.0605) by Won Ju-Min 14) Mimi (미미 - Mimi) by Im Mok-won 15) Mising (미싱 - The Sewing Machine) by Huinari 16) Sikkeureoun Jip (시끄러운 집 - Noisy Tenants) by Digeut 17) Meori (머리) by Sam-Chon 18) Mongyubyeong (몽유병) by bunny 19) Hosu Gongwonui Yeoja (호수 공원의 여자) by Spring 20) Popi Mom (뽀삐맘) by Gong Yuk 21) Geokkuro Seoneun ja (거꾸로 서는 자) by Dan-woo 22) Doro Wiui Angma (도로 위의 악마) by Lee Daeyang 23) Gyedan, Mureup, Dalmasian (계단, 무릎, 달마시안) by Mapache 24) Suhagyeohaeng (수학여행) by Seo Irae/ Yeong-I Yeong 25) Misikga (미식가) by 247 26) Inganui joe (인간의 죄) by Seon Taek-gil 27) Mijiwaui Jou (미지와의 조우) by Kim Yong-Ki 28) Bulchibyeong (불치병) by Rangddo 29) Busan Noraebang Gwisin (부산 노래방 귀신 - The Busan Karaoke Ghost) by Horang

Due to an unexpected accident, Choi Yu-Jeong, an ordinary college student, owes some money from the owner of a cafe called "Delicious Blood." Daniel, the owner of the cafe, tells Choi Yu-Jeong to pay off her debts by working part-time at his cafe. Choi Yu-Jeong eventually starts a part-time job, but the handsome boss Daniel, doesn't let her off the hook.Who is Daniel? And what will happen to Yu-Jeong?(Source: POCKET COMICS)

I possessed a supporting character in a reverse harem novel. As a young concubine who gained the interest of the empress. The concubines and male lords, eventually killed her for treason. Fortunately, I possessed her just as she was entering the Imperial Palace. Everyone in the Imperial Palace was wary of me, but didn't hate me yet. I don't need, nor do I want to be loved by the empress. "Come to my room tonight. I'll read you a fairy tale!" 'Woo, don't cry. I'll give you this." But why is everyone so kind to me? I couldn't understand. (Source: Kakao, translated) Note: This is a promotional one-shot for the homonym novel.

To uphold her father's wishes, Seizel Aramis lived an honest and virtuous life, only to be betrayed by those she trusted, conned by crooks, sent to jail, and executed. But the moment she dies, Seizel wakes up in the past, right before her misfortunes began. This time, Seizel decides to live life differently by becoming the greatest swindler in the empire! Armed with a newfound goal and the determination to fulfill it, can Seizel succeed in going from noblewoman to con-woman?

(Source: Tapas)

After her parents' death, Lady Vanessa is left with only two things—a mountain of debt and a marriage. Her greedy uncle is all too willing to sell her off as a fresh bride to an aging earl. To escape this arranged fate, she needs a scandal. A truly horrible, ruinous scandal.(Source: Manta)

title_en: Living Out My Deadline as the Tyrant's Wife
description:
When she wakes up as an extra in a fantasy novel, married to a villain and destined to be poisoned to death, Lea knows she must change her fate. Her strategy? Get rid of the booze and men in her harem, soften up her tyrannical emperor husband by being kind and gentle with him, and make him fall in love with her for real! But he’s been trained his whole life not to feel anything at all... Hopefully, that pesky prophecy about an emperor with feelings bringing doom to the empire isn’t true!

(Source: Tapas)

One day, I suddenly had the ability to transform into a video game character!
The skills and appearance are all mine.
I am now always a "face genius"!

(Source: Naver, translated)

The strongest man of the Murim, “Asura,” got transported to another world. Having reached the pinnacle through his martial capabilities alone, he smashes the status window and the tower with his own hands—rejecting participation as a player outright.(Source: Naver, translated)

Jun-Ho Kim loved pro-wrestling more than anyone but he couldn’t escape the racial standards. After his meaningless retirement, while working as a construction worker, he got caught up in an unexpected accident… and when he opened his eyes, he returned to the day before his WWF entrance exam!

“This time, I won’t end as the villain ‘king-fury’ with a 0.7% success rate!”

He returned to his 20s body with all the knowledge he’s worked so hard for and information about the future. He will not repeat his history of being ‘jobber’, the expert at losing. He will rewrite the history of pro wrestling together with the wrestler that will take over the future, to ultimately become the god of pro wrestling, an ‘icon’ of the era!

Adel, who entered the emperor's office using the power of the Imperial Palace's magical door, accidentally hears the secret plans of the emperor.
'Emperor' 'fiance' 'fake' 'killing'
When Adele came back to the academy, the interior minister and the emperor appeared and took her breath away.
"I'll give you a chance to choose."
"...Chance?"
"Go to  prison or be my fiancée!"
Thus, the beginning of the fateful love between the orphaned girl Adel and the emperor of Krishi.

Kinemia Lyon's got two rules for surviving a novel: recruit talented geniuses to save her territory and don't get involved with Ayan Krotz, a dangerous mage. But when Ayan gets captured for trespassing on her land over and over again, she decides to hire him as her bodyguard instead. Unfortunately, letting Ayan into her life means dealing with his erratic magic and even more concerning personality! Can Kinemia come to tame this master mage? Or will she regret not kicking him out for good?(Source: Tapas)

title_en: Shards of a Broken Glass Slipper
description: Siché lost everything to her stepsister, Roena. Love, reputation, and family all shattered like a broken glass slipper. She was framed as Cinderella’s evil stepsister, hated for merely existing in high society. Her resentful last words should have been the end of her suffering... But the reality was far more devastating. Siché had traveled back in time to the day she met Roena. This time, Siché will quench her thirst for vengeance. After all, the glass slippers were never meant for her anyway.(Source: Tapas)

The hero who saved the world and the King of all the Relics, the Majesty Jooheon Suh. He lives a “peaceful” life exploring and raiding tombs for the sake of his future daughter until he is prompted by the Rule Book to take part in the Majesty War. Initially dismissive, Jooheon intends to ignore the Rule Book’s odd demand until his daughter’s existence is removed from this world. With the knowledge that god-rank relics are behind his daughter’s disappearance, Jooheon takes a stance against the relics and fights against the anomalies brought about by his strange encounter with the Rule Book. Even if he must face literal gods, Jooheon will stop at nothing to bring back what was his.(Source: WEBTOON)

Tareya DeLov awakens in a novel to find herself married to the cold and aloof Duke Anteros Mel DeLov, who's cheating on her with a mistress! Appalled, she immediately petitions for divorce, hoping to keep her share of wealth and win the public's sympathy. But as the divorce comes closer to being approved, Anteros won't leave Tareya alone, remorseful and relentlessly begging her to reconsider. Will Tareya succeed in separating from her husband? And what's with Anteros' sudden shift in attitude?
(Source: Tapas)

Eliano, the daughter of a powerful duke, marries the seventh prince of Jakador, and they fall in love. But their happiness is short-lived when the prince ascends to the throne. After suffering a miscarriage, she is cruelly poisoned by her husband and dies. Eliano miraculously wakes up to find herself 21 years old and is now determined to avoid the tragic future she once lived. Will she be able to find happiness in this new life?(Source: WEBTOON)

A necromancer is a profession considered the noble of nobles, with less than 1,000 in the population worldwide! I was born with a diamond spoon, no, a necromancer spoon in my mouth! ...Or so I thought. "I'm just a defective necromancer." [Using skill, "Summon Ordinary Skeleton" (E-rank).] You'd think a necromancer should be able to summon liches, Dullahans, or death knights. But nope, I can only summon skeletons. But then one day, suddenly... [Hidden condition achieved!] [Condition: The 10,000 Uses Rule] [Your rank has upgraded to D-rank!] I achieved the hidden condition and gained the ability to raise my skeletons. From E-rank to S-rank! The story of Joo Donghoon unfolds, the world's only cursed necromancer, who's speeding toward becoming a ranker!(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

Born into a world where divine power defines status, Turan hides his true strength to live as a simple shepherd. Descended from a line of wizards yet raised in secrecy, he avoids the attention of powerful nobles who would exploit him. But when a wandering knight recognizes his extraordinary potential, Turan is faced with a life-changing choice. Will he remain in hiding, or journey to the capital and embrace the destiny he was meant for?
(Source: WEBTOON)

title_en: There's No Such Thing as a Bad Lady
description: Raised in the slums of Ebelstein, Derek knows all too well that magic cannot bridge social divides. Through harsh lessons and hard-earned discipline, he rises to become a second-tier mage, scraping by as a mercenary. Life takes a different turn when he is appointed as a magical tutor to Diella Duplain-- the temperamental youngest daughter of a noble house, unable to wield magic despite her lineage. Though Derek is her last resort before exile to a convent, Diella clashes with him from the start. Together, will they be able to prove that there’s no such thing as a “bad” lady?(Source: WEBTOON)

Prom, a member of K-Pop group Destiny, has a secret. In his past life, he was Prometheus, cursed by Zeus for eternity to fear fire. This curse keeps messing with him—he can’t even blow out birthday candles! But one day he meets Sora, a college student, at a fan signing and recognizes her as Pandora! He knows Pandora’s box can save him, but she has no clue what he’s talking about. With his acting debut as a fireman at stake, will Sora remember who she is and extinguish Prom’s fears for good?

(Source: Tapas)

Jin-Ju is bad. She smokes, drinks, runs away from home, and has no qualms making her parents worry. Her mother and sister beg her to be a better student, sister, daughter; her beleaguered father expresses his concerns with his fists. Bad Friends is set in the 1990s in a South Korea torn between tradition and Western modernity and haunted by an air of generalized gloom. Cycles of abuse abound as the characters enact violence within their power structures: parents beat children, teachers beat students, older students beat younger students. But at each moment the duress verges on bleakness, Ancco pulls back with soft moments of friendship between Jin-Ju and her best friend, Jeong-Ae. What unfolds is a story of female friendship, a Ferrante-esque connection formed through youthful excess, malaise, and struggle that stays with the young women into adulthood. 

Served by a dry and precise line, Bad Friends viscerally captures the adolescent years of two young women who want and know they deserve something different, but, ultimately, are unable to follow through. In a culture where young women are at a systemic disadvantage, Ancco creates a testimonial to female friendship as a powerful tool for survival. Jin-Ju forgets her worst adolescent memories, but she cannot ever shake the memory of her friendship with Jeong-Ae during her most tumultuous years. 

(Source: Drawn & Quarterly, edited)

Eunhong is an actress -- just not famous yet. After being dumped by her boyfriend of 9 years, she gets involved in an incident with the CEO of LJ Pharmaceutical, Kang-il. And out of the blue, he wants to “hire” her as his fiancée. In order to save face from her ex-boyfriend and avoid being charged, Eunhong accepts his offer, but can she pull off the role of a beautiful yet mysterious French heiress without being busted?(Source: WEBTOON)

The social outcast, Seria, had changed.

Seria Shuteren, the vile woman who had everyone trembling with fear at her feet, was now calm. Truthfully, the woman had not just changed; she was a completely different person. Realizing she had possessed the wicked woman's body in this romance novel, she decided to live on the low, having a hunch about the future.

She would end Seria's dreadful habits and successfully avoid her death by decapitation at the hands of Kalis, the sub male lead!

Lady Lilian Isilot, while being one of many young ladies of high society, is known for her beauty and composure. In the Arman Kingdom, women with thin arms and legs who dress well and have mild manners are more likely to marry into prestigious families. This is why Lilian, who comes across as poised and reserved, is an ideal role model for other noble ladies despite being unmarried. So when the holy lord, Luth, appears before her and warns her of approaching evil and that she is to be his chosen warrior, Lilian quickly declines. But upon realizing that she has no choice in the matter and that saving the world will land her a kind, sexy, and hot blond husband she only sees in Wananet Flixenchil’s novels, Lilian decides to accept the mantle of warrior and lead a double life!

(Source: Tappytoon)

Beauty, brains wealth—Duke Claude Winterville had it all, except one thing: sleep. Then April Renoen, a healer-barista, walks in and cures his insomnia with a single cup of her coffee. As they grow closer, Claude discovers that it's not just her coffee that captivates him, but the woman herself...(Source: Manta)

title_en: The Villainous Duke's Daughter's Special Method of Growing Rice
description:
When you transmigrate into a novel as the villainess destined to die, there are different ways to survive: flirting with the male lead, learning to fight, or finding happiness elsewhere—but not Erica! She has decided to become a successful rice farmer just like in her past life! What follows is an epic (and rather surreal) quest to find the last rice seeds in the world, tame a giant rabbit magic beast, recruit magicians to water the fields, and—Wait, did she just turn the Holy Sword into a hoe?!

(Source: Tapas)

The fragile but cheeky Laviette is not here to save the plot of the novel she transmigrated into. Instead, her goal is to escape her fate of a short life through her best friend, Ahckard, and his healing powers. The novel says he'll fall for her brother, so she sees him as just a friend. However, it doesn't seem like Ahckard plans to follow the original plot either. Will Laviette have to look elsewhere for her happy ending, or will she realize that what she needed has been beside her all along?

(Source: Tapas)
